reference: Ye nyɛmimɛ! Jehanɛ lɛɛ i suɔ kaa i kɛ nyɛ maa tu munyu ngɛ nike níhi nɛ jeɔ Mumi Klɔuklɔu ɔ ngɔ ɔ a he. I suɔ kaa nyɛɛ le anɔkuale ɔ nɛ kɔɔ ní nɛ ɔmɛ a he.
hypothesis: yenyimi kɛnɛlɛisun kanyi kanyi matumu nyu, ngannike nijwɛmu kɛnkɛnngɔ ahe, isun kanyi ale anukwaleɔ ne kɔɔ nime ahe.

reference: Nyɛ le kaa benɛ nyɛ ji wɔ jali ɔ, amagahi nɛ wami be a mi ɔ a se a gblaa nyɛ ya nyɛɛɔ.
hypothesis: Nye le kɛɛ bɛ nɛ nyɛli ma ngɔɔ. Amagayi nɛ wa mi bɛ amɛ, a se agbo la nyɛ yɛ anyɛ.

reference: I ngɛ hae nɛ nyɛɛ le kaa nɔ nɛ Mawu mumi ɔ ngɛ e mi ɔ, e de we ke, “A gbiɛ Yesu.” Jã kɛ̃ nɔ ko be nyɛe ma de ke, “Yesu ji Nyɔmtsɛ” hulɔ kaa ja Mumi Klɔuklɔu ɔ tsɔɔ lɛ blɔ.
hypothesis: Nyɔŋmɔ ha e nɛɛ lɛɛ ka, nɛɛ nɛɛ mɔ mumuɔi nɛɛ emiɔɔ, ede wɛɛ kɛɛ, agbee Yesu. Ja kɛɛ nɛɛ ko benɛɛ ma deke, Yesu ji nyu nɛɛ kɛɛ o hulɔ, ka ja mɔ mumu kɛɛ kɛɛ chuɔ lɛ bɔ.

reference: Blɔ slɔɔtohi a nɔ a guɔ kɛ sɔmɔɔ, se Nyɔmtsɛ kake ɔ nɔuu a sɔmɔɔ.
hypothesis: Blɔ ɔ tɛn, nɛ anɔagbɔ, kɛsɔmɔ. Se nyɛɔ, tsua kɛkiɔnɔ, asɔmɔ.

reference: Ní tsumi slɔɔtohi ngɛ, se Mawu kake ɔ nɔuu lɛ haa nɔ tsuaa nɔ he wami nɛ hia lɛ nɛ e kɛ tsuɔ ní.
hypothesis: Níyɛ ji mi swa tɔyɛ ngɛ. Sɛmɔ nɛ o kɛ kɛ ɔ nɛ lɛ ha nɛ o chwa nɔ, he wa mi nɛ hiɛ alɛ nɛ e kɛ chuɔ nɛ.

reference: Mawu haa nɔ tsuaa nɔ okadi ko kɛ̃ nɛ tsɔɔ kaa e mumi ɔ ngɛ nɔ ɔ mi, konɛ nɔ ɔ kɛ tsu ní ha asafo ɔ tsuo.
hypothesis: Ma o ha no, o tsuo no o ka di ko ke ne, ne tsuo ka e mu mu o nge no mi. Ko ne no o ke chuni ke ha asafo o tsuo.

reference: Mawu mumi ɔ haa nɔ ko he wami nɛ e kɛ tuɔ munyu nɛ juɛmi ngɛ mi. Jamɛ a mumi ɔ nɔuu haa nɔ kpa hu he wami nɛ e kɛ tuɔ munyu nɛ sisi numi ngɛ mi.
hypothesis: maomo mɛo hanɔ kɛɔ hewami nɛ e kɛ tuɔ munyu nɛ jwemingami. Jɛma mɛo no o hanɔ kpamɔɔ hewami nɛ e kɛ tuɔ munyu nɛ sese nɔ mingami.

reference: Mumi kake too ɔ haa nɔ ko hemi kɛ yemi, nɛ e haa nɔ kpa he wami nɛ e kɛ tsaa hiɔ.
hypothesis: Wemika ke tuo ha no ko he mi kaye mi, ne e ha no pa he wa mi ne e ke cha hi o.

reference: Mumi ɔ haa nɔ ko he wami nɛ e kɛ tsuɔ nyakpɛ ní, nɛ e haa nɔ ko hu he wami nɛ e kɛ fiɛɔ Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ. Mumi ɔ haa nɔ kpa hu he wami nɛ e kɛ kpaa mumi slɔɔtohi a si. Mumi ɔ haa nɔ ko he wami nɛ e kɛ tuɔ gbi slɔɔtohi, nɛ e haa nɔ kpa hu he wami nɛ a kɛ tsɔɔ kikɛmɛ a gbi nɛ ɔmɛ a sisi.
hypothesis: Mumu o ha no ko o he wami ne e ke chu nyapeni. Ne e ha no ko o he wami ne e ke fie o mau segbe o. Mumu o ha no pa o he wami ne e ke pa mumu insroto yi asɛ. Mumu o ha no ko o he wami ne e ke tu ogbi sroto yi. Ne e ha no pa he wami ne e ke chu kike magbi ne o me asɛ.

reference: Se mumi kake ɔ nɔuu lɛ tsuɔ ní nɛ ɔmɛ tsuo; e haa nɔ tsuaa nɔ nike ní pɔtɛɛ ko kaa bɔ nɛ lɛɛ e suɔ.
hypothesis: Kɛɛ mo mi kɛɛ ko nɛɛ, le chu nɛɛ wɛɛ chu. E haa no chu haa no kɛ ni pɔtɛɛ kɛɛ, bɔ nɛɛ lɛ ɛsuɔ.

reference: Mawu ngɔ mumi kake ɔ nɔuu ngɔ wo wa tsui mi, nɛ wa ti nɔ tsuaa nɔ ba plɛ pee Kristo he nɔ́ ko, Yuda no jio, ma je no jio, nyɔguɛ jio, nɔ nɛ ye e he jio.
hypothesis: Ma momi ka kɛ ɔ nɛ wɛɛ wa tsu mi. Nɛ wa tsi nɔ tswaa nɔ ba plɛmpe Kristo he nɔ ko. Yuda nɔ jio, maji nɔ jio nyɔngwɛ jio nɛ nɛ ye ehɛ jio.

reference: Ejakaa nɔmlɔ tso ɔ nitsɛ ɔ, pi he nɔ́ kake ji lɛ, se mohu he níhi babauu.
hypothesis: E ya kɛɛ no mo chuo nɛɛ chuo. Pi he no kɛɛ kɛɛ jilɛ, se mo nge ni baba u.

reference: Ke nane ma de ke, “Akɛnɛ i pi nine he je ɔ, pi nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he nɔ́ ko ji mi” ɔ, lɔ ɔ tsa tsɔɔ we kaa pi nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he ní ɔmɛ eko ji lɛ niinɛ.
hypothesis: Kɛ nɛ ni ma deke, a kɛɛ nɛ e pini nɛ e he jee o. Pii nɛ mla chuɔɔ he no kɛ jio mi o. Lɔɔ chacha wɛɛ kan, pii nɛ mla chuɔɔ he nɛ ni o me kɛ jila ni o ne.

reference: Nɛ ke tue hu ma de ke, “Akɛnɛ i pi hɛngmɛ he je ɔ, pi nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he nɔ́ ko ji mi” ɔ, lɔ ɔ tsa tsɔɔ we kaa pi nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he ní ɔmɛ eko ji lɛ niinɛ.
hypothesis: Nɛkɛ tsu ɔ ma dekɛ akɛ nɛɛ epihɛngwɛɛ jio. Pii nɔmlɔ tsuɔ he nɔ ko jimi o, lo chakɛwɛɛ ka pii nɔmlɔ tsuɔ he nio mɛi kɔji lɛ ni nɛ.

reference: Ke nɔmlɔ tso ɔ tsuo ji hɛngmɛ ɔ, kɛ e maa pee kɛ nu nɔ́ kɛɛ? Nɛ ke lɛ tsuo ji tue ɔ, kɛ e maa pee kɛ nu nɔ́ he fu kɛɛ?
hypothesis: kèé nɛ́ɛ kɛ́ó wɔ́kɛ́ ó gbíé nɛ́ɛ́ ŋúɛ́. Kɛ́ é máá pɛ́ɛ́ kɛ́ nɛ́ɛ́ nóó kɛ́e. Ní kɛ́lɛ́ kɛ́ó gbíé túó, kɛ́ é máá pɛ́ɛ́ kɛ́ nɛ́ɛ́ nóó é fú kɛ.

reference: Se kaa bɔ nɛ wa le ɔ, Mawu to nɔmlɔ tso he ní ɔmɛ tsuo kakaaka ngɔ ma nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he kaa bɔ nɛ e to nɛ a hi ɔ.
hypothesis: He kɛ bɔ nɛ wa leɔ, ma nɛ ɔ nɛ wa suɔe ni ɔ mɛ chuɔ kɛɛ kɛɛ, ngɔ ma nɛ wa suɔe he kɛ bɔ nɛ etɔ ne a hiɔ.

reference: Ke he ní ɔmɛ tsuo peeɔ he nɔ́ kake too ɔ, lɔ ɔ lɛɛ nɔmlɔ tso ko tsa be si hie!
hypothesis: Ke he ni o me chu o pe wa he no ka ke to o. Lo le no mo chu ko cha be si hie.

reference: Se kaa bɔ nɛ wa le ɔ, he níhi babauu lɛ ngɛ, se nɔmlɔ tso ɔ lɛɛ kake too.
hypothesis: Sɛɛ ka bɔne wa leo. He ni baba wu le ngɛ, sɛɛ ni ngɛ wa chuɔ le kake tɔ.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, hɛngmɛ be nyɛe ma de nine ke, “O he hia we mi!” Yi hu be nyɛe ma de nane ke, “O he hia we mi.”
hypothesis: Lahiɔ, hiɛ ma bɛnyɛ e ma dɛ ne nɛ kɛ o hyei ahiɛ wɛ mi, yi hu bɛnyɛ e ma dɛ nɛ nɛ kɛ o hyei ahiɛ wɛ mi.

reference: Dɛbi! Nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he níhi nɛ peeɔ wɔ kaa a he wɛ pe kulaa a, mɛ mohu a he hia wɔ titli.
hypothesis: Debi, nomɛɛ kɛ ya enɛɛ nɛ piɔɔ ka, ahi we pe klaa, mɛɛ mɛ ngɛ ayi nya wɔ titi

reference: Nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he níhi nɛ wa bui kpakpa ko ɔ, mɛ mohu a nɔ wa hyɛɛ saminya. Nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he níhi nɛ sɛ nɛ a jeɔ kpo ngɛ ma hɛ mi ɔ, lɔ ɔmɛ lɛ wa jeɔ blɔ haa a he saminya.
hypothesis: Nɛɛmɔ lɔcɔ he ni inɛɛni wa bui kpakpakoɔ. Mɛɛmɔ nɛ anɔ wa hie saminya. Nɛɛmɔ lɔcɔ he ni inɛɛni sɛɛ, nɛɛ ajioɔ kɔngɛ mɛɛ he miɔ. Lɔɔ mele wa jioɔ blo ha ahi saminya.

reference: Ní nɛmɛ nɛ wa naa daa nɛ ɔ lɛɛ e hia we kaa a pee mɛ jã. Nɛ́ Mawu pee nɔmlɔ tso ɔ, e he ní komɛ nɛ wa susuɔ kaa a he be se nami tsɔ ko ɔ, lɔ ɔmɛ mohu a hɛ mi nyami nɛ e wo pe kulaa.
hypothesis: Niɛni mɛni wa na da nɛ ɔ lɛ ehia wɛ kɛ ha pe mɛ ja ni mɛ wa pe no nɔ chuɔ. E ni ko mɛni wa su su kɛ ai e bɛ sɛ nɛ mi choo nɔ chuɔ. Lo mɛ mɛ wa hɛɛ mɛ nya mɛ nɛ ewɔ pe kɛ law.

reference: Mawu pee enɛ ɔ, konɛ mi gbami nɛ ko ba nɔmlɔ tso ɔ mi, se mohu nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he ní slɔɔto ɔmɛ tsuo suɔ a he, nɛ a nuɔ nɔ he ha a sibi.
hypothesis: ma pe ne o kone mi gba mi ne ko ba nu blo chua mi se mo hu nu mlo chua ni suat o mi chua su wa a he ne a nu no e he a se bi

reference: Ke nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he nɔ́ kake ngɛ nɔ́ nae ɔ, he ní kpa amɛ tsuo kɛ lɛ naa nɔ́. Nɛ ke he nɔ́ kake hɛ mi ba nyami ɔ, he ní kpa amɛ tsuo kɛ lɛ naa bua jɔmi.
hypothesis: Gbi nɛ mɛɛ nɛ tsuo he nɛ o kɛ kɛngɛ no nɛ yɔɔ. He ni kpɛi amɛ tsuo kɛ lɛ nɛ a nu. Ni ke he nɛ o kɛ kɛngɛ he mi banyam yo. He ni kpɛi amɛ tsuo kɛ lɛ nɛ a bwa jɔɔ.

reference: Nyɛ tsuo pɛpɛɛpɛ ji Kristo nɔmlɔ tso ɔ nɛ, nɛ nyɛ ti nɔ tsuaa nɔ peeɔ Kristo nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he nɔ́ ko.
hypothesis: Nya choo pe pe je Kristo no lo choo ne. Nya ti no choo anɔ piɔ Kristo no lo choo he no

reference: Mawu ngɔ he ní nɛ ɔmɛ tsuo ngɔ to a blɔ hehi ngɛ asafo ɔ mi, kɛ je kekleekle blɔ he kɛ ya si nyagbe nɔ́. Mɛ ji bɔfohi, Mawu sɛ gbi fiɛli, kɛ tsɔɔli. Nihi nɛ ba ngɛ a se ji nyakpɛ ní peeli, nihi nɛ a ha mɛ he wami nɛ a kɛ tsuɔ ní komɛ, nɔ́ nɛ á kɛ tsaa nɔ, loo a kɛ yeɔ bua ni kpahi, loo a kɛ toɔ blɔ nya saminya, loo a kɛ tuɔ gbi slɔɔtohi.
hypothesis: Ma ŋɔɔhe nɛ niinɛ womɛɛ chwɔŋɔɔ tuu abloheɛɛ heɛ asafoohomi. Keje kɛkɛkɛɛ bloheɛ kee asi nya gbenɔ. Meji bɔfoɔ hii. Maasegbi fialii, kechwɔlii, niinee baŋɛ asɛɛ ji nyapɛɛ niipelii. Niinee ahamehe waaminɛɛ akɛchwɔɔnikomee, noɔ nɛ akɛchaa noɔ, loo akɛyoo bwaa nikpanyi, loo akɛtua blo nyasaminya, loo akɛtua gbinslotoɔ.

reference: Pi ni ɔmɛ tsuo ji bɔfohi, loo Mawu sɛ gbi fiɛli, loo tsɔɔli. Pi nɔ tsuaa nɔ nɛ ngɛ he wami nɛ a kɛ peeɔ nyakpɛ ní.
hypothesis: ni ngmɛ́ chuu dhibo foɛ, lo mɔ̃ sɛ gbefiɛ li, lo chɔ̃ li, pino chuu a nonɛ ngɛ he wami, nɛ akɛ pio nyakpɛɛ nɛ.

reference: Pi nɔ tsuaa nɔ nɛ ngɛ he wami nɛ a kɛ tsaa hiɔ, loo a kɛ tuɔ gbi slɔɔtohi. Pi nɔ tsuaa nɔ ko hu nɛ ngɛ he wami nɛ a kɛ tsɔɔ gbi sisi.
hypothesis: Binɔcuano nɛ ngɛ he wami nɛ akɛ cahio lo akɛ tuɔ gbi srɔtɔyi. Binɔcuano kɔhɔ nɛ ngɛ he wami nɛ akɛ cɔɔ gbi sisi.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, nyɛɛ bɔ nike níhi nɛ a he jua wa a a he mɔde.
hypothesis: Na hie. Nyɛ bɔ ni kɛ nɛɛ ni ehe jwama ahe mɔ

reference: Se nɔ́ nɛ hi pe lɛ tsuo ji nɛ ɔ nɛ.
hypothesis: Dε nɛɛ ne pɛɛlɛ chɔ jina ɔnɛ?

reference: Imi Paulo, nɛ Mawu suɔmi nya a, e tsɛ mi nɛ ma ba pee Yesu Kristo bɔfo ɔ, i kɛ wa nyɛmi Sostene lɛ wa ngma womi nɛ ɔ.
hypothesis: Emi Paulo, ne ma sɔmɔ ne nyɛ, e tya nyɛ ma ba pɛ Yesu Kristo bɔ fɔɔ. Hii kɛ wanya mi sustee nɛɛ ma o mi nɛɛ, wanga o mi nɛɛ ma e kɛɛ a ha ma wɛ asafonyo nɛɛ Korintho. Ni nɛɛ achua hi, ne a pɛɛ mi krun krun ha Yesu Kristo, kɛ ni nɛɛ nge he chua hi, ne a jaa Kristo.

reference: Dloomi kɛ he jɔmi nɛ je wa Tsɛ Mawu ɔ, kɛ Nyɔmtsɛ Yesu Kristo dɛ mi ɔ ha nyɛ.
hypothesis: Jomi kɛɛ jomi ne jɛ wache mɔ ngɔɔ. Kɛɛ nyɛɔ munyaa Yesu Kristo dɛmiɔ ha nyɛ.

reference: I naa Mawu si daa kɛ haa nyɛ ngɛ dloomi nɛ e ngɔ ha nyɛ kɛ gu Kristo Yesu nɔ ɔ he.
hypothesis: na mɔɔ sinda kɛ hanye ngɛ dromi nɛ e ngɔ hanye kɛ gu Kristo Yesu no he.

reference: Ejakaa nyɛ ya hɛ mi ngɛ nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́ mi, munyu tumi jio, nile jio.
hypothesis: E ya kaanyɛɛ ahe ni ngɛɛ nɔ chuɔ nɔ mi, mɔ nyu tumi jiɔ? ni le jiɔ.

reference: Kristo he odase nɛ nyɛ ngɛ yee ɔ ba he si wawɛɛ nɛ nihi na.
hypothesis: Kɛɛ kee, o da teni nɛɛ ngɛ yoɔ ba, he nɛɛ si wa we nɛɛ nɛɛ hi.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, be mi nɛ nyɛ ngɛ Nyɔmtsɛ Yesu Kristo bami ɔ blɔ hyɛe nɛ ɔ, mumi mi nike ní ko kulaa be nyɛ hiae.
hypothesis: Mlolɔɔ. Be minɛ nyɛ nyɛ́mɔ kɛɛ Yesu Kristo ba miɔ mlolɔɔ yɛɛ nɔ. Mu mi ni kɛɛ ni kɔ klɔɔ he bɛ nyɛ hiɛ.

reference: Mawu nitsɛ maa hɛɛ nyɛ kɛ maa ya nyagbe, konɛ ligbi ɔ nɛ wa Nyɔmtsɛ Yesu Kristo maa ba a, piami ko piami ko kó hi nyɛ he.
hypothesis: Mauni ke ma henyɛ ke ma ya nyagbe, ko ne ligbi o ne wanyom kɛ Yesu Kristo ma ba. Piamiko piamiko ko hinyɛ.

reference: Mawu, nɔ nɛ kpee nyɛ ke nyɛɛ kɛ e Bi Yesu Kristo, wa Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ ba bɔ huɛ ɔ, anɔkualetsɛ ji lɛ.
hypothesis: Aa, nɔɔ neɛ kwɛnyɛ nyɛkɛɛ bi kɛ Yesu Kristo kwanɔɔ, neɛ choo ba bɔ hwuoo. Anɔ kwa le tɛɛ ji lɛ.

reference: Nyɛmimɛ, i ngɛ nyɛ pɛɛ kpae ngɛ Nyɔmtsɛ Yesu Kristo biɛ mi kaa nyɛ tsuo nyɛ nya nɛ pee kake, nɛ mi gbami kó ba nyɛ kpɛti. Nyɛ yi mi, kɛ nyɛ juɛmi nɛ pee kake.
hypothesis: Nye mi mi, ngɛ nyɛ pɛkpae ngɛ nyɔmɔtse Yesu Kristo biɛ mi. Ga nyɛ tsuɔ nyɛ nyanyɛ pɛ kake, nɛ mi gwa mi kɔba nyɛ pɛti, nye yi mi kɛ nyɛ jumi ne pɛ kake.

reference: Ye nyɛmimɛ, i ngɛ nyɛ enɛ ɔ dee, ejakaa ni komɛ je Kloe we ɔ mi ba wo ye tue nɔ ke pɛ ngɛ nyɛ kpɛti.
hypothesis: Yɛ nɛ me, ingɛnɛɛ enɛɛ ɔ de, ejakɛ anyɛ ko mi je klooe weo mi ba wɛi tɔɔnɔ kɛ penɛɛ kpeci.

reference: Nɔ́ nɛ i ngɛ tsɔɔe ji, nyɛ ti nɔ tsuaa nɔ ngɛ nɔ́ ko nɛ e ngɛ dee. Nɔ ko ke, “Paulo nɔ́ ji mi”, nɛ nɔ ko hu ke, “Imi lɛɛ Apolo nɔ́ ji mi”; nɔ kpa ke, “Imi lɛɛ Kefa nɔ́ ji mi”; nɛ nɔ kpa hu ke, “Oo, imi lɛɛ Kristo nitsɛ se nyɛɛlɔ ji mi.”
hypothesis: Nɛ nɛ e ngɛ chuoji. Nɛti nɔ chua nɔ ngɛ nɛ nɔ kɛɛ ngɛ deɛ, nɔ kɛ ke, Paulo nɔ jimi. Nɛ nɔ ke o kɛ, imi lɛ Apollo nɔ jimi, nɔ kɛ ke, imi lɛ Kefas nɔ jimi, nɛ nɔ kɛ o ke, o, imi lɛ Kristo ni chɛ senyɛ lo jimi.

reference: Anɛ a gba Kristo mi lo? Anɛ Paulo nɛ a sɛu ha nyɛ lo? Anɛ Paulo biɛ mi a sɔle nyɛ kɛ wo lo?
hypothesis: Agbɛ Kristo mi lo? A nɛ Paulu nɛ asɛhɔ nyɛ lo? A nɛ Paulu biɛ mi asɔle nyɛ kɛ wo lo?

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, nɔ ko be nyɛe ma de ke a sɔle nyɛ kɛ wo ye biɛ mi.
hypothesis: La he, no ko benye ma de ke aso le nyekewoo ye bie.

reference: Niinɛ, i sɔle Stefana kɛ e we mi bi ɔmɛ hulɔ. Se i kaii we kaa i pa sɔle nɔ kpa ko hu.
hypothesis: Nene, e sa le se fa nake e we mi bi o o ni hu lo? Se e ka e we ka, e pa so le no kpa ko hu.

reference: Kristo tsɔ we mi ke ma ba sɔle nihi. E tsɔ mi ke ma ba fiɛ sane kpakpa a; pi kɛ nya mi dɔkɔɔ, kɛ adesa nile, konɛ gbenɔ nɛ Kristo gbo ngɛ sɛumi tso ɔ nɔ ɔ kó pee yaka.
hypothesis: Kristo, c'est au moins qu'il n'est pas le nouveau. Et, c'est au moins qu'il n'est pas fier ça de papa. Puis, quelqu'un m'a dit quoi ? Que Adele sa n'est le, Koné gbe na ne, Kristo gbe gaseme su ono, ko pe ya ka.

reference: Ejakaa nihi nɛ a hɛ mi miɔ nɛ e ma kpata a, buɔ sɛ gbi ɔ nɛ kɔɔ sɛumi tso ɔ he ɔ kaa kuasiahi a sane ko kɛkɛ. Se wɔ nɛ a ngɛ wa yi wami hee ɔ, wɔɔ lɛɛ e ji Mawu he wami ha wɔ.
hypothesis: e ya ka ni ne a he mi yoo ne e ma kwa taa. Buo se guo ne ko se mi chuu o he o ka kwa si anii asa ni e ku keke. Se wo ne ange wa ye wa mi he o, wo le e ji maun he wa mi hao.

reference: Ngmami ɔ ke,
hypothesis: man yoku

reference: “Ma ha nɛ ní leli a nile ma puɛ, nɛ ga leli a ga tsuo maa pee yaka.”
hypothesis: ma hɛ ne ni leli, ani le ma puɛ nɛ ga leli, agaa tuɔ ma pe ya kɛ.

reference: Jije ní leli ɔmɛ ngɛ? Jije ga leli ɔmɛ ngɛ? Jije je nɛ ɔ mi sane mi hlali ɔmɛ ngɛ? Ee, Mawu ha nɛ je nɛ ɔ mi nile ɔ plɛ pee kuasiahi a sane.
hypothesis: diji anɛ lɛ lɔngɛ diji gã lɛ lɔngɛ diji je naɔ mi sa nɛ mi lalo mɛngɛ e mangbe hã nɛ jɛ naɔ mi ni lio nɛ ɔ kpe kpe kwasɛi asante

reference: Mawu ngɔ e nile ɔ kɛ tsi adesa blɔ, konɛ adesa kó nyɛ nɛ e gu lɛɛ e ní lemi nɔ kɛ le Mawu. Se mohu ɔ, sɛ gbi ɔ nɛ wa ngɛ fiɛe nɛ nihi buu kaa kuasiahi a sane ɔ, Mawu to kaa e kɛ ma he ni nɛmɛ nɛ heɔ yeɔ ɔ a yi wami.
hypothesis: Mɔɔ e nì lìɛ kɛ́ tšì à dè samla. Kòní à dè sàm, kònyè nè è gùn lɛ́, è nì lìɛ mí nɔ́, kɛ́ lɛ́ màŋ. Sɛ́ mɔ́ hwuɔɔ, sɛ́ gwiɔ́nɔ́ wàngɛ́ fìɛ ɛ̀, nè nì bʊ́ kan kwɛ̀sɛ́n à sànìɛ. Màŋ tòkán ɛ́ kɛ́ mà hɛ́ nì ní mɛ̀nɛ́ hìɔ́ yɔ̀ɔ, àyì wà mɔ.

reference: Yuda bi hlaa kaa a pee okadi ha mɛ nɛ a na loko a he sɛ gbi ɔ nɛ a ye. Hela bi hu hlaa kaa a maa nu nile munyu ko ngɛ mi lo.
hypothesis: Nyɛɛ daa bii laakan, apee o kadi ha mee, neɛɛ a na loko a ye sɔgbeeo nɛɛ aye, helabi hɔɔ laakan, amã nuu nile munya kuɛɛ mi loo.

reference: Se wɔɔ lɛɛ Kristo nɛ a sɛu ɔ wa ngɛ fiɛe. Enɛ ɔ peeɔ blɔ tsimi nɔ ha Yuda bi, nɛ Hela bi hu buu lɛ kaa kuasiahi a sane.
hypothesis: Tɛ wɛlɛ kɛɛ, Kristo nɛ asɛng wa ngɛ fiɛɛi? Ɛnɛ o piɛɛ bɔɔ kɛɛ minɔ ha yoo dabi. Nɛ hɛ la bii hu buulɛ kɛɛ akɛ siɛɛi asɛng?

reference: Ee, nihi nɛ Mawu hla a, Yuda bi jio, Hela bi jio, mɛɛ a le kaa Kristo ji Mawu he wami, kɛ e nile.
hypothesis: Nii, ni nɛ ma ho la, Yudabejo, he la bijeo, me ale ka Kristo ji ma ho hewa mi ke eni lɛ.

reference: Ejakaa ke Mawu je kuasia tete po, adesa kɛ e nile nɛ nya wa a na we lɛ; ke Mawu gbɔjɔ tete po, adesa kɛ e he wami kpetekpleenyɛ ɔ na we lɛ saasaa.
hypothesis: Anya ka kae ma oje kɛwɔ kɛtɛtɛpo. Adeɛsɛɛkɛ ɛni le nɛ nya wa na we le. Ke ma o ngbɛ jɔtɛtɛpo. Adeɛsɛɛkɛ he wa mi kɛ tɛ klɛɛ nya we lesa ha.

reference: Ye nyɛmimɛ, nyɛ kai bɔ nɛ nyɛ ngɛ ha loko Mawu tsɛ nyɛ ɔ. Ngɛ he lo blɔ fa mi ɔ, nyɛ ti nihi bɔɔ pɛ ji ní leli, nihi bɔɔ pɛ ji nihi nɛ a he wa, nɛ bɔɔ pɛ ji odehehi.
hypothesis: nyɛnyɛnyɛ, nyɛ kɛɛɛ nyɛ ngɛ ha lo ko ma u cɛnyɔɔ, nyɛɛ lo blafɔ mi o nyɛɛ ti nyɛɛ bɔɔ pɛɛ jinɛ lili, ni bɔɔ pɛɛ jinɛ nɛ ahiwa, ni bɔɔ pɛɛ jinɛ odehe.

reference: Mawu je blɔ hla je ɔ mi kuasia níhi, konɛ e kɛ gbe ní leli zo. Mawu hla je ɔ mi níhi nɛ gbɔjɔ, konɛ e kɛ gbe níhi nɛ a he wa a zo.
hypothesis: Ma ngi blela Jio o mi kwasi a ni. Koni e ka gbe ni le lizo. Ma ngi blela Jio o mi ni ne gbojo, koni e ka gbe ni ne a he wa zu.

reference: E hla níhi nɛ je ɔ bui, níhi nɛ a hiee, kɛ níhi nɛ pi nɔ́ ko kulaa a, konɛ e kɛ gbe níhi nɛ je ɔ buu saminya a a he guɛ.
hypothesis: E la nine nɛ jɔɔ bue, nine nɛ ahiɛ, kɛ nine piɛnɛ kɔkɔɔ, kɔnɛ ekɛgbe nine jɔɔ buɛsɛ mi nya ahiɛguɛ.

reference: E pee enɛ ɔ, konɛ nɔ ko nɔ ko kó fĩa ngɛ e hɛ mi.
hypothesis: Peɛ ɛnɛ ɔ, kɔnɛ nɛ kɔnɛ kɔ kɔ fĩã ngɛ ɛhe me.

reference: Se Mawu ngɔ nyɛ kɛ ba, konɛ nyɛɛ kɛ Kristo Yesu ba bɔ. E ha nɛ Kristo ba pee wa nile. Kɛ gu Kristo nɔ ɔ, Mawu pee wɔ nihi nɛ da. Wa ba plɛ pee e ma klɔuklɔu, nɛ a he wa yi wami.
hypothesis: Se ma huɔnyɛ kɛ ba, kɔnɛ nyɛ kɛ Kristo ba bɔ. Ehã nɛ Kristo ba pe wanyilɛ, kagɔɔn Kristo nɔ, ma hã ŋmɛɛ wanyilɛ nɛ da. Wa baa ple pe ehɛ ma kuku kuku, nɛ a hɛ wa yuwa mɛ.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, kaa bɔ nɛ ngmami ɔ deɔ ɔ, “Nɔ nɛ suɔ kaa e maa fĩa a, e fĩa ngɔ fɔ nɔ́ nɛ Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ pee ɔ nɔ.”
hypothesis: La he o? Ka mponɛ ngmami o deo? No nɛ suɔ ka e ma fia? Efia ngɔ fono no nɛ nyam-choo-piɔnɔ.

reference: Benɛ a ngɛ bɔku ɔ sisi, kɛ wo ɔ mi ɔ, a sɔle mɛ kaa Mose se nyɛɛli.
hypothesis: Mɛnɛ angɛ bo ko sisi, kɛ wuo mi o, asɔlɛ mi ka mɔ sɛ sɛɛnyɛ.

reference: Mɛ tsuo a ye mumi mi ní kake,
hypothesis: Nɛɛ tsoɔ ayɛɛ mu mumi nɛɛ kɛ

reference: nɛ mɛ tsuo a nu mumi mi nyu kake ɔ nɛ je mumi mi tɛ sa nɛ nyɛɛ a se ɔ mi. Jamɛ a tɛ sa a ji Kristo.
hypothesis: Nɛ mɛɛcɔ̃ anú mumi nɛnyɔ kakao, nɛ jɛ mumi nɛ tɛsa nɛ nyɛ asɛo mi. Jamɛ tɛsa ji Kristo.

reference: Se enɛ ɔ tsuo se ɔ, Mawu na we a ti nihi fuu a he tsui. Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, a kpata a hɛ mi ngɛ nga a nɔ.
hypothesis: Se e na kyo si o, ma o na we ati ni fu a e tsu, lo he o, akpon tan ahe ni nge ngã nu. Ni na o ma kyo bami ka no.

reference: Nyɛ ko ja amaga kaa bɔ nɛ a ti ni komɛ pee ɔ. Kaa bɔ nɛ ngmami ɔ deɔ ɔ, “Ma a pue si, nɛ a ye ní, nɛ a nu ní, nɛ a fiɛ yakayaka fiɛmihi.”
hypothesis: Nyɛ kɛɛ ja, amɛ gã, kɛɛ bone ehati ni kɛmɛɛ pɛ ɔ, kɛɛ bone mwami odɛ ɔ. Ma pɛɛ si, ne ayɛɛ ni, ne anunu ni, ne afyɛ yakayaka fyɛɛ mii hi.

reference: Wa ko fiɛ yakayaka fiɛmi kaa bɔ nɛ a ti ni komɛ pee, nɛ nimli akpe nyingmi enyɔ kɛ etɛ gbo ligbi kake ɔ.
hypothesis: vakofia yaka yakafia mi kpa bone atiniko mepe ne nimli akpe nyui enyoka ete ngbeli gbi kakelo

reference: Wa ko ka Nyɔmtsɛ
hypothesis: wɔ kɔ kã nyɔŋɔ

reference: Wa ko tu munyu huitihuiti kaa bɔ nɛ a ti ni komɛ pee, nɛ bɔfo nɔ́ puɛlɔ ɔ kpata a hɛ mi ɔ.
hypothesis: Waa ko tumu nyu ti witiwiti kaba nɛ atinikɔmɛ pɛ. Nɛ bɔ fɔlɔ pɛ nɛ ɔ kɔɔ ta ahe mi.

reference: Níhi nɛ ba a nɔ ɔ peeɔ okadi kɛ ha ni kpahi. A ngma ní nɛ ɔmɛ kɛ ngɛ wɔ kɔkɔ bɔe, ejakaa be nɛ wa ngɛ mi nɛ ɔ kɛ nyagbe be ɔ kɛ we kulaa.
hypothesis: ni nɛ ba anɔ pɛ okadi kɛ ha ni kpanyi. Agbɛnɛ nɛ o mɛ kɛ ngɛ wa kɔkɔ bɔyi, e ja kɛ bɛni wa ngɛ mi nɛ ɔ kɛ nyɛgbe biɔ kɛ we kula.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, nɔ nɛ susuɔ kaa e daa si ɔ, e hyɛ e he nɛ hi, konɛ e ko nɔ si.
hypothesis: La hɛɔ, nɔ ne suɔ ka eda siɔɔ, e ya ehenehĩ kɔne ekɔɔnɛ.

reference: Kahi nɛ baa nyɛ nɔ ɔ, ekoeko be nɛ bɛ adesa nɔ hyɛ. Se Mawu yeɔ e siwo nɔ, nɛ e be hae nɛ a ka nyɛ pe bɔ nɛ nyɛ ma nyɛ. Ke ka ba nyɛ nɔ ɔ, Mawu ma ha nyɛ he wami nɛ nyɛ kɛ da nya, konɛ nyɛɛ je mi.
hypothesis: Kɛɛ hɛni ba nyɛɛ nuu, ekuɛ ko beni bɛɛ adisɛɛ nɔhiɛ. Se mawu yoo eshi wo nu, ni ebe hɛɛ ne ekanɛɛ pe bɔ nɛɛ nyɛma nyɛ. Ke ka ba nyɛɛ nuu, mawu ma ha ni ehewami ni nyɛ kɛ danya kɛ nɛɛ nyɛ ji mi.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, ye huɛmɛ nɛ i suɔ, nyɛɛ yu nyɛ he kɛ je amaga jami he kulaa.
hypothesis: La hio, ye nyɛ me ni, esuɔ, nyɛ yuu nyɛɛ kaa je ya ma ga jami he kulaa.

reference: I kɛ nyɛ ngɛ munyu tue kaa a kɛ juɛmitsɛmɛ tuɔ munyu; nɔ́ nɛ i ngɛ dee ɔ, nyɛ nitsɛmɛ nyɛ kɔ se.
hypothesis: Nyɛ kɛ nyɛ ngɛɛ mu nyɛ tuɛ, kɛ akɛ jwɛmi kɛ mɛ tuɔ mu nyu. No nɛ i ngɛ deɔ, nyɛ ni jwɛmi nyɛ kɔsɛ

reference: Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ niye ní kplu ɔ nɛ wa naa Mawu si ngɛ he ɔ, anɛ e ha we nɛ wɔ tsuo wa naa gbaami nɛ jeɔ Kristo muɔ mi ɔ eko lo? Jã kɛ̃ ke wa ku abolo ɔ nɛɛ, anɛ wɔ tsuo wa na we gbaami nɛ jeɔ Kristo nɔmlɔ tso ɔ mi ɔ eko lo?
hypothesis: Nya tje ni oni kploo. Nne wa na maosi ngɛ hio. Ane eha wɛ ni wɛ tjo wa na gba mi, nɛ dji o Kristo mo mli o eko loo? Dja kɛɛ kɛ wa kun aboloɔ nɛ. Ane wɛ tjo wa na wɛ gba mi nɛ dji o Kristo nu mlɔ tjo o mli o eko loo.

reference: Bɔ tsuaa bɔ nɛ wa hiɛmi ngɛ ɔ, wɔ tsuo wa yeɔ abolo kake ɔ eko. Enɛ ɔ tsɔɔ kaa Kristo nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he níhi ji wɔ tsuo.
hypothesis: Bo tsua, bo ni wa hia mi nɛɛ o. Bo tsua wa yo, abo le ka ki o, eko. E nɛɛ o tsuo ka Kristo numiɔ tsuo, he ni nji bo tsuo.

reference: Lɛɛ kɛ i ngɛ tsɔɔe kɛɛ ɔ? Kaa amaga, loo niye ní nɛ a haa amaga a he hia lo?
hypothesis: Lɛ kɛɛ yɛɔ nɛ ekeo. Kɛɛ amagaa, lɔɔ nɛ e nɛ aha amagaa hiɛ hie.

reference: Dɛbi! Nɔ́ nɛ i ngɛ dee kɛkɛ ji, bɔ nɛ wɔ jali sãã a, mumi yayamihi a sãã ngɔ haa, se pi Mawu. Nɛ i sume kaa nyɛɛ kɛ mumi yayamihi nɛ bɔ huɛ.
hypothesis: Debi, ni ni ngɛ dekake ji, bo ne wo jali sã, mu mi yaya mi asã ngo ha, se pima ne isi me kaa nyɛ gbe mu mi yaya mi ne bo.

reference: Nyɛ be nyɛe maa nu Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ kplu ɔ, nɛ́ nyɛ ma ya nu mumi yayamihi hu a kplu. Nyɛ be nyɛe maa ye ní ngɛ Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ we okplɔɔ ɔ he, nɛ nyɛɛ kɛ mumi yayamihi hu ma ya ye ní.
hypothesis: Nyɛ bɛ nyɛ ma nu nyɔngmɛɛ okplɔɔ. Nɛɛ nyɛ ma ya nu mumuyɛɛ ya mi hu okplɔɔ. Nyɛ bɛ nyɛ ma yi nɛɛ ngɛ nyɔngmɛɛ okplɔɔ nɛɛ. Nɛɛ nyɛ kɛ mumuyɛɛ ya mi hu ma ya ye nɛɛ.

reference: Pe wa ngɛ hlae nɛ waa wo Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ mi mi la nɛ e je hunga lo? Anɛ wa he wa pe lɛ lo?
hypothesis: Pe wa ngɛɛ laa nɛ wa wo nyɔngmɛɛ o mimila, ni ejɛ hu ngɛɛ lo. A ni wa he wa peɛ lɛ lo.

reference: Nɔ ko nɔ ko nɛ kó hla kaa e hi ha lɛ nɔ kake too; nɔ tsuaa nɔ nɛ susu e nyɛmi hu he.
hypothesis: No kɔnɔ kɔnɔ laka ehi ha lenɔkake to. No chua no nɛ susua enyɛmi hu.

reference: Lo tsuaa lo nɛ a ngɛ juae ɔ, nyɛ ma nyɛ ye faa; enɛ ɔ peemi kó hao nyɛ he nile.
hypothesis: Lɔɔ tsua lo ne agbe jwɛɛ yoo. Nɛɛma nɛɛ ma yɛ faa. Enɛɛ oo, pɛɛ mii kɔ ha o, nyɛɛ he ni le.

reference: Ejakaa ngmami ɔ ke, “Je ɔ, kɛ e mi níhi tsuo ɔ, Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ nɔ́.”
hypothesis: Eya ka mami oke? Ji okee emi ni cuo? Nyom ce ono

reference: Ke nihi nɛ he we yi ɔ a ti nɔ ko tsɛ nyɛ ní yemi, nɛ nyɛ ya a, nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́ nɛ a kɛ maa ma nyɛ hɛ mi ɔ, nyɛɛ ye nɛ nyɛ he nile ko hao nyɛ kulaa.
hypothesis: Ke ní ni nɛ he we yoo, a ti no kɔɔ nyɛ nɛ niɛ mi nɛ nyɛ ya, no chua no ni akɛ ma manyɛ he mio. Nyɛ ye, nyɛ niɛ he ni le ko ha o nyɛ kpla.

reference: Se ke nɔ ko de nyɛ ke, “Niye ní nɛ ɔ, a kɛ sã bɔ ha amaga” a, lɔ ɔ lɛɛ nyɛ ko ye. Pi nyɛ nitsɛmɛ, loo nyɛ he nile he je nɛ i ngɛ nyɛ enɛ ɔ dee, se nɔ kpa a nɛ de nyɛ lo ɔ he sane ɔ, lɛ mohu e he nile he je.
hypothesis: Dekɛ nɔkɔ madɛkɛ, ní ení nɔ akɛ sambɔhã amagã lɔ lɛ nyɛkɔyɛ, binyɛni cɛmɛ lɔ nyɛhenii le hɛji nɛ ingɛɛ nɔdɛɛ. Sɛɛnɔ kpɛa nɛ dɛnyiɛ lɔ hɛisã nɛ o, lɛmohũ ehɛni le hɛji

reference: Ee, nɔ ɔ he nile nɛ i ngɛ tsɔɔe ɔ nɛ; pi nyɛ nitsɛmɛ nyɛ he nile.
hypothesis: E, nɔɔ heni le nɛ nɛɛ, nge chɔɔ yɔɔ nɛ, pi nyɛ niɛmɔ heni le.

reference: Nɔ ko ma bi ke, “He blɔ nɛ i ngɛ kaa i peeɔ nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́ nɛ i suɔ ɔ, mɛni he je nɔ kpa he nile maa tsɔɔ mi bɔ nɛ imi ma plɛ kɛ tsu jamɛ a he blɔ ɔ he ní ha?
hypothesis: nɔ kɛ ma bike, hɛblɔ nɛ i ngɛ kanɛɛ, i pɛɛ ɔ nɛɛ, swana nɛɛ i suɔ. Mɛni hiɛ jɛ nɔ kpa hɛɛ ni lɛ, mɛɛcɔ̃, imi bɔnɛ i ma plɛ kɛ cɔ̃ jama hɛblɔ hɛɛ ni hɛɛ.

reference: Ke i nyɛ gbaa niye ní nɔ nɛ i ye ɔ, mɛni he je nɔ ko tuɔ ye he munyu yaya ngɛ niye ní nɛ i na Mawu si ngɛ he ɔ he?”
hypothesis: Kɛɛ, inyɛ ba nyɛo, nɛ nɔ nɛ yoo. Minɛ nyɛ jɛ nɔ kɔtuo yɛɛ, munyui yaya. Nɛɛnyɛ nɛɛ, inɛ mɔɔsi ngɛ hie.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́ nɛ nyɛ ngɛ pee ɔ, ní nyɛ ngɛ yee jio, ní nyɛ ngɛ nue jio, nyɛɛ pee lɛ tsuo kɛ wo Mawu hɛ mi nyami.
hypothesis: Laio, nɛɛ tsua nɛɛ ni ngɛ pɛɛo, ni nyɛ ngɛɛe jiio, ni nyɛ ngɛɛe nuu jiio, nyɛɛ pɛɛ laɛɛ tsua kɛɛ o mau hɛɛ mi nyamɛ.

reference: Nyɛ ko pee nɔ́ ko nɛ sɛ kɛ si Yuda no ko, loo ma je no ko, loo Mawu we asafo ɔ.
hypothesis: Nyɔngɔ bɛɛɛ nɛ kɔɔ nɛɛ se kɛɛsɛɛ yuda nɛɛ kɔɔ. Loo ma jɛɛ nɛ kɔɔ. Loo ma wee asafɔ.

reference: Nyɛ wo ye nane. Nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́ mi ɔ, i bɔɔ mɔde kaa ma sa nihi tsuo a hɛ mi. I susuu we imi nɔ kake too ye he, se mohu i hlaa kaa e hi ha nɔ tsuaa nɔ, konɛ a he a yi wami.
hypothesis: Nyɛ woɛ nɛ anɛɛ? No nɛɛ tswaa no mi o, e bɔɔ mɔɔ dɛɛkɛɛ ma sa nɛɛ nɛɛ tswaa ahɛɛ mi, e suusuu we nɛɛ mi nɛɛ kɛɛ to o yɛɛ, se mɔɔnɛɛ e laa ka, e nyɛ ha nɛɛ tswaa anɛɛ kɔnɛ ahɛɛ ayi wa mi.

reference: Ke i nyɛɔ nɛ i tuɔ adesahi a gbihi, loo hiɔwe bɔfohi po a gbihi, se i be suɔmi ɔ, lɛɛ i ngɛ kaa gɔ̃gɔ̃, loo ngmlɛ nɛ ngɛ pɛe gegeege kɛkɛ.
hypothesis: Ke i nyɔ ne i tuɔ adesay agbeyi? Lo hio, bɔ fɔnyi pɔ agbeyi. Se ibe sun mi ɔ, le inge kã gọngɔn? Lo ngɔ la nɛ ngɛ peɛ gɛgɛ gɛgɛ.

reference: Ke a dloo mi he wami nɛ a kɛ fiɛɔ Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ, ke i le nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́, nɛ i nuɔ laami sanehi tsuo a sisi, ke i ngɛ hemi kɛ yemi nɛ nya wa ngɛ Mawu mi, nɛ ma nyɛ ma hia yohi, se i be suɔmi ɔ, ye he be se nami ko kulaa.
hypothesis: ge adro mi hewami ne akɛ fiɛ ɔ ma nɛ sɛ gbiɔ ke ile no tsho a nɛ ne inɔo lami sane nɛɛ tsho atisɛ ke ingɛ hɛmɛ ke mi nɛ nya wange maomi ne manye mahia yoo hi sɛ ibɛ somio jehe bɛɛ sɛ namikɔ kla

reference: Ke i ngɔ ye níhi tsuo ngɔ ke, nɛ i ngɔ ye nɔmlɔ tso tete ngɔ ha nɛ a sã mi, se i be suɔmi ɔ, i na we he se ko kulaa.
hypothesis: Ke enyɛ ya nɛ niɛɛ tsu ngɔɔ ke ne enyɛ ya nɛɛmɔ tsuɔ tɛtɛ ngɔ hane asami. Se ibɛ suomi ɔ. Inɛ bu hese ko klaa.

reference: Suɔmi toɔ e tsui si, nɛ e mi mi hi. Suɔmi hɛ kɔɛ; e fĩɛ, nɛ e pee we pupuupu.
hypothesis: Suomi toi ekuzii ne emimihi. Suomi hekue efié ne epewe pupu

reference: Suɔmi pee we níhi nɛ sɛ́; e fo we lɛ nɔ kake too e nɔ́ mi; e mi mi wui la, nɛ e kɛ nɔ ko tɔmi wui e mi.
hypothesis: So me peo eni he ne se efo wle no kake to enomi, e mi mi wila, ne e ke no to mi wi eni.

reference: Suɔmi nya we nɔ́ yayami he; anɔkuale mohu he nɛ e nyaa.
hypothesis: Mo minya bɛni ɔ ye, mi he. Ano kwale, mɔ ɔ he e nya.

reference: Suɔmi haa nɔ toɔ tsui si ngɛ nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́ mi. E haa nɔ heɔ nɔ tsuaa nɔ́ yeɔ; e ngɔɔ e hɛ ngɔ fɔɔ Mawu nɔ, nɛ e miaa e hɛ mi ngɛ níhi tsuo mi.
hypothesis: Wɔ mi haa nɛ e tɔɔɛ, ke e senga nɛ wɔ mi, e haa nɛ e senga nɛ wɔ nɛ, e ngɔɔ, e he ngɔ fɔɔ ma nɛ, ne e mia e he mi nɛɛ tsuɔ mi.

reference: Suɔmi se pui gblegbleegble. Se mumi mi nike níhi kaa Mawu munyu ɔ fiɛmi, kɛ gbi slɔɔtohi tumi, kɛ nile lɛɛ a se maa po ligbi ko.
hypothesis: Sua mi se poe gbegbegbe. Se mumuni ke ni ka ma mu nyu fie mi. Ke bi suor tu ni tu mi, ke ni le le a se ma po li gbi.

reference: Ejakaa ní nɛ wa le ɔ, wa li kɛ pi si; fiɛmi nɛ wa fiɛɔ hu, fa kɛ fa kɛkɛ.
hypothesis: Eyɛka nɛ ni wã leɔ. Wã likɛ pisɛ. Fiemɛni wã fiɛɔ hu. Fakɛ fakɛ.

reference: Se ke nɔ́ nɛ hi kɛ pi si ɔ ba a, lɔ ɔ lɛɛ nɔ́ nɛ ji fa kɛ fa a maa laa.
hypothesis: Sé ke nɛnɛi kɛ pision ba. Lɔlɛ nɛnɛi ji fɔng kɛ fɔng amɛ la.

reference: Benɛ i ji jokuɛyo ɔ, i tuɔ munyu kaa jokuɛyo, i juɛɔ kaa jokuɛyo, nɛ i susuɔ kaa jokuɛyo. Se benɛ i ba wa a, i kpa jokuɛwi a ní peemi.
hypothesis: Bɛne i ji jukunyao. I tu amunyu kɛ jukunyao. I juɛmɔ kɛ jukunyao. Ne i susuɔ kɛ jukunyao. Se bɛne i bawa. I kpajukunyao wi ani peemi.

reference: Amlɔ nɛ ɔ lɛɛ wa ngɛ kaa ni komɛ nɛ ngɛ nɔ́ hyɛe tsuu kɛkɛ ngɛ ahuhuɛ mi. Se hwɔɔ se ɔ, wa maa na nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́ paa. Piɔ lɛɛ ní nɛ i le ɔ, fa kɛ fa kɛkɛ. Se jamɛ a be ɔ lɛɛ ma le ní kɛ pi si kaa bɔ nɛ Mawu le mi kɛ pi si ɔ.
hypothesis: Amlalo le wange kani kome, ninge nu hie i chu kange ahie mi, se huosio, wama na nuchuano pan, biolo nine ileo, faka faka ke, se jama biolo, male neke pisikam bone ma onu le neke piso.

reference: Amlɔ nɛ ɔ, ní etɛ nɛ ɔmɛ nɛ ngɛ: hemi kɛ yemi, hɛ kɛ nɔ fɔmi, kɛ suɔmi. Se nɔ́ nɛ pe mɛ tsuo ji suɔmi.
hypothesis: Amle no. Niɛɛtɛɛ na amɛ nɛ ngɛ. Hɛɛ mi kɛ yɛɛ mi. Hɛɛ kɛɛ noo fo mi. Kɛɛ sɔ mi. Seɛɛ nɛ pɛ mɛɛ tsuo ji sɔ mi.

reference: I ngɛ nyɛ yi jee, ejakaa nyɛ kaiɔ ye ní peepee, kɛ níhi nɛ i tsɔɔ nyɛ ɔ daa. Tsɔɔmihi nɛ i na kɛ je nihi a dɛ, nɛ imi hu i ngɔ kɛ ha nyɛ ɔ, nyɛ pɛtɛ he.
hypothesis: nɛ ji ngɔ pɛɛɛ nɔhi amɛ nɔ, i ngɛ nyɛ yii jɛ, ejaakɛ nyɛ kayoo ye ni pɛpɛɛ, kɛnɛɛɛ i chonyɛɛ oda, chomii nɛ inaa kɛjɛ nɛɛ hi adɛɛ, nɛ imii inwɔ kɛhanyɛɛ, nyɛpɛtɛɛ.

reference: Se i suɔ nɛ nyɛɛ nu sisi kaa Kristo ngɛ he wami ngɛ nyumuhi tsuo a nɔ kaa bɔ nɛ nyumu ji yi kɛ ha e yo, nɛ Mawu hu ji yi kɛ ha Kristo ɔ.
hypothesis: Tè è swɔ nyɛ nɛ nyɛ susu kaa Kristo ngɛ he wami ngɛ nyɛ mui tso anɔ kaa bɔ nɛ nyɛ mui ji yi ke ha e yoo. Nɛ ma hũ ji yi ke ha Kristo.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, ke nyumu ngɛ sɔlee, aloo e ngɛ Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ fiɛe, nɛ e kɛ nɔ́ ha e yi nɔ ɔ, e ngɛ Kristo nɛ ji yi ɔ he guɛ gbee.
hypothesis: Lɔɔ hee, kɛnyɛ mongɛ sole, aloo ɛngɛ mawu sɛɛ guɛɔ fĩɛɛ, nɛ eke nɔ ha ɛyĩ nɔ, ɛngɛ Kristo nɛ ji yoɔ heguagbe.

reference: Jã kɛ̃, yo tsuaa yo nɛ ngɛ sɔlee, aloo e ngɛ Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ fiɛe, nɛ e kɛ nɔ́ hɛ́ e yi nɔ ɔ, e huno nɛ ji e yi ɔ hɛ mi si e ngɛ puee ɔ nɛ. Slɔɔto be e kɛ yo nɛ sɛ e yi nɔ a kpɛti.
hypothesis: Ya ke, yo chua yo nɛ ngɛ sole. Halo, ɛ ngɛ maamɛ sɛgwiɔ fioɛ. Ne ɛ kɛ no hɛɛ eyi no, ɛ huɔ ne ji eyiɔ, he mi si ɛ ngɛ pueɔ ne. Sroto bɛ ɛ kɛ yo nɛ sɛ eyi no, akwɛtɛ.

reference: Ke yo kɛ nɔ́ hɛ́ e yi nɔ ɔ, lɛɛ e sã e yi nɔ mɔ. Se ke zo ngɛ lɛ pee kaa e ma sã e yi nɔ, loo e maa sɛ e yi ɔ, lɛɛ e kɛ nɔ́ nɛ ha e yi ɔ nɔ.
hypothesis: Ke yoo kɛnɔɔ ha eei nɔɔ, lɛ e sane eei nɔ mɔ. Sɛɛ ke e zɔŋɔ lɛ pɛ, kɛ e ma saŋ eei nɔɔ, lɔɔ e ma se eiyo. Lɛ e kɛ nɔ nɛ ha eiyo nɔ.

reference: E sɛ kaa nyumu kɛ nɔ́ haa e yi nɔ, ejakaa Mawu subai mi a bɔ lɛ ngɛ, nɛ e woɔ Mawu hɛ mi nyami. Se yo lɛɛ nyumu hɛ mi nyami womi nɔ́ ji lɛ;
hypothesis: e se kanyi mukɛ no ha eino. Ejaaka maa osu ba mi abo leŋɛ. Ne e wo maa hemi nyami. Se yoo le, nyumu hemi nyami wo mi no jila.

reference: ejakaa a bɔɛ nyumu kɛ ji yo mi, se yo mohu nɛ a bɔ kɛ je nyumu mi.
hypothesis: Eyaka abwɛnyu keji yoomi, sena yoomi huni abo kɛjɛ nyumu.

reference: Jehanɛ hu, a bɔɛ nyumu ha we yo, se yo mohu nɛ a bɔ ha nyumu.
hypothesis: Ya ne hu, abwo nyumu ko eha we yo, se yo mohu ne abo ha nyumu.

reference: Enɛ ɔ he ɔ, e sa kaa yo nɛ ha e yi nɔ kaa okadi ha hiɔwe bɔfo ɔmɛ kɛ tsɔɔ kaa a ha lɛ he blɔ ke e sɔle, loo e fiɛ Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ.
hypothesis: Eno hie, esaa ka olee ha ei nu, ka o kadi haa he wee bo fo o me. Ke choo ka aha le he bro ka e so le, lo e fie mawo se gbe.

reference: Se ngɛ Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ hɛ mi ɔ, yo be e dɛ he, nɛ nyumu hu be e dɛ he.
hypothesis: Dɛŋɛ nyɔɔ tɔɔ hɛɛ miɔ, yoo bɛɛ e de hɛɛ, nɛɛ nyumuu bɛɛ e de hɛɛ.

reference: A je yo kɛ je nyumu mi, nɛ nyumu tsuaa nyumu hu yo lɛ fɔ lɛ. Niinɛ, nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́ je Mawu ngɔ.
hypothesis: Ajee yoka jenumu mi, ne nyumu chua nyumu hu yole fole. Nne, no chua no je mau no.

reference: Kɛ nyɛ nitsɛmɛ nyɛ susuɔ kɛɛ? Anɛ e da kaa yo maa sɔle ha Mawu ngɛ ma hɛ mi, nɛ e hɛ́ e yi nɔ lo?
hypothesis: Ke nyɛɛ nɛ nyɛɛ tu suɔ ke, ane, e da kɛɛ yoo ma sole ha mɔɔ, nge ma he mi, nɛ e he ɛɛ yi nɔ nɛ.

reference: Hyɛ, anɛ adebɔ nitsɛ tsɔɔ we nyɛ kaa ke nyumu fia e yi kusuu ɔ, e ngɛ zo lo?
hypothesis: A nɛ adebɔnɛ kɛ tɛ tswɛ we kan, kɛ nyɛɛ fia e yiku sɔɔ, e ngɛ zolo

reference: Yo lɛɛ e yi bwɔmi fuu ɔ ji e hɛ mi nyami. Mawu ha yo yi bwɔmi nɛ e kɛ ha e he.
hypothesis: Yoo, eyi bɔmi fuɔ ji ehe mi nyami. Ma wo ha yo yi bɔmi ne e ke ha e.

reference: Se ke nɔ ko susuɔ kaa nɔ́ nɛ i de ngɛ nɔ́ nɛ ɔ he ɔ be mi ɔ, nɔ́ nɛ ma de kɛkɛ ji kaa i kɛ Mawu asafo ɔ, wɔɔ lɛɛ wa be jami blɔ nya tomi kpa ko ngɛ enɛ ɔ se.
hypothesis: bɛganɔ kɔsusu ka nɔne idɛ ngɛ nɔhiɔ bɛmiɔ, nɔne madɛ kɛkɛ ji ka ike mɔɔ asafɔɔ, wole wa bɛjamibɔnyatɔ mi kpakɔ ngɛ enɔhiɔ.

reference: Jehanɛ ɔ lɛɛ nɔ́ nɛ ma de nyɛ nɛ ɔ, pi kaa ma je nyɛ yi. Ejakaa ke nyɛ kpe ɔ, nɔ́ kpakpa ko ji mi; ní yayahi mohu nyɛ peeɔ.
hypothesis: Ja ne le, nonɛ ma de nyɛ nɛ o. Pika ma dɛ nyɛ yi. E ja ka ke nyɛ pee o, nɛ ko kwa ko jimi. Ne ya mi mo hu nyɛ pee o.

reference: Kekleekle ɔ, i na le kaa ke nyɛ bua nyɛ he nya kaa Kristo asafo ɔ, kɛkɛ nyɛ gba nyɛ mi kɛ wo kuu slɔɔtohi a mi. I heɔ yeɔ kaa anɔkuale ko kɛ̃ ngɛ nɔ́ nɛ i nu nɛ ɔ mi.
hypothesis: ke le ke o inɛlɛ kan kan ye bwayo yɛɛnyɔ, ka Kristo asafɔo ke kenye bwayo mi ke o ku sro toin ami, iyo yoo kan, ana kpalekɔ kɛngɛ nɔne inu ne o mi.

reference: Niinɛ, e he hia kaa mi gbami ko kɛ̃ nɛ hi nyɛ kpɛti, konɛ a na Kristo se nyɛɛli kpakpa amɛ paa.
hypothesis: Nii nɛ, ee, nyaa kɛ mi gbami ko kɛɛ nɛɛ hi nyɛpeti. Kone aduna Kristo sɛɛ nyɛɛ li kpakpa amɛɛ fã.

reference: Ke nyɛ nya ba bua a, pi Nyɔmtsɛ niye ní ɔ nɛ nyɛ yeɔ.
hypothesis: Kɛɛ nyɛ nyɛba bua. Pi nyɛu nɛɛ niɛ nɛɛ nyɛio?

reference: Ejakaa ke nyɛ ngɛ ní ɔ yee ɔ, nɔ tsuaa nɔ he sɔɔ kɛ yeɔ lɛ nitsɛ e niye ní. Nɛ benɛ hwɔ ngɛ ni komɛ yee ɔ, ni komɛ hu tɔ dã.
hypothesis: ɛɛ yaa gbe niɛɛ nyɛ yoo, nɔ chua nɔ he sɔɔ kɛ yoo lɛ niɛɛ eniɛɛ ni. Ne bɛ ni huga ni kɔ mɛ yoo, ni kɔ mɛ hu tɔɔ.

reference: Anɛ nyɛ be nyɛ nitsɛmɛ nyɛ wehi nɛ nyɛ maa ye ní, nɛ nyɛ maa nu ní ngɛ lejɛ ɔmɛ lo? Aloo pe nyɛ ngɛ hlae nɛ nyɛɛ gbe Mawu asafo ɔ he guɛ, nɛ nyɛ pue ni nɛmɛ nɛ be nɔ́ ko ɔ a hɛ mi si? Kɛ ma de nyɛ kɛɛ? Ma je nyɛ yi lo? Dɛbi, i be nyɛ yi jee!
hypothesis: Anyɛ nyɛbɛ ni nche minyɛ weyi, nɛɛnyɛ mayɛ ni, nɛɛnyɛ ma núnine lɛ jɛ omeelo. Aloo pɛ nyɛɛlae nyɛgbɛ maŋ asafo ohe gwee. Nɛɛnyɛ pwonine mine bɛnu ko owa hɛ misii. Kɛ ma dɛnyɛ kɛ, ma jɛ nyɛ yilo. Dɛbi, ibɛ nyɛ yijɛ.

reference: Nɔ́ nɛ i ná kɛ je Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ dɛ mi ɔ, lɔ ɔ nɛ i kɛ ha nyɛ ɔ nɛ, kaa Nyɔmtsɛ Yesu ɔ, jamɛ a nyɔ ɔ mi nɔuu nɛ a tsɔɔ e se blɔ ɔ, e kɛ̃ abolo,
hypothesis: Nene inakajenyɔɔtɛmiɔ, lɔne ikɛ hɛnyɛɛne kanyɔ mca Yesuɔ, jamanyɔminɔne acɛngɛseblɔ, ikɛ abolɔ

reference: nɛ e na Mawu si, nɛ e ku mi, nɛ e de ke, “Enɛ ɔ ji ye nɔmlɔ tso nɛ a ku ngɛ nyɛ he. Nyɛɛ pee enɛ ɔ nɛ nyɛ kɛ kai mi.”
hypothesis: nɛ ë ma sisi, nɛ ë kume, nɛ ë de kɛ. Ë nɔ jii ënɛ mɔtɔ nɛ akunganyi hɛ. Nyɛ pee ënɛ nɛ nyɛ kɛ kai.

reference: Ja nɔuu e wo kplu ɔ hu benɛ a ye ní ɔ ta a, nɛ e de ke, “Kplu nɛ ɔ ji Mawu somi he ɔ nɛ a kɛ ye muɔ sɔu nya. Nyɛɛ pee enɛ ɔ, be tsuaa be nɛ nyɛ maa nu ɔ, nɛ nyɛ kɛ kai mi.”
hypothesis: Jaanɛ, ewɔkulo hunu bɛnɛ ayɛ ni otan nɛ edɛ kɛ. Mli nɔ oji mɔɔ somi hɔ nɛ akae mɔɔ sɔ nya. Nyɛpɛɛ nɛ, bɛcwaa bɛnɛ nyɛmaa nɔ nɛ nyɛkɛɛ kai ni.

reference: Enɛ ɔ tsɔɔ kaa be tsuaa be nɛ nyɛ maa ye abolo nɛ ɔ eko, nɛ nyɛ maa nu wai ngɛ kplu nɛ ɔ mi ɔ, nyɛ ngɛ Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ gbenɔ sane ɔ fiɛe kɛ yaa su be nɛ e maa ba.
hypothesis: E nɛɛ jɔmɔ kɛ. Bɛɛ cwa bɛɛ nɛɛ nyɛma yaa abolo nɛɛ weku. Nɛɛ nyɛma nɔɔ kplu nɛɛ hu lɔ. Nyɛɛ nga nyɛɛ cɛɛ gba nɔsanyɔ fĩɛɛ kɛ yɛ su bɛɛ nɛɛ ma ba.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, nɔ tsuaa nɔ nɛ yeɔ Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ we abolo ɔ, nɛ́ e nuu wai nɛ ngɛ kplu ɔ mi bɔ nɛ sɛ ɔ, e peeɔ yayami kɛ siɔ Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ nɔmlɔ tso ɔ, kɛ e muɔ ɔ.
hypothesis: Mloɔ hiɔ, nɛ cuaa nɛ yɔ nyɔm tɛo abɛlo nɛ enuɔ wa ngɛ kplɔɔmi bɔnɛ sɛɔ? E pioɔ yaya mikɛ siɔ nyɔm tɛo nɛ mloɔ cuɔ? Kɛ emɔ.

reference: Nɔ tsuaa nɔ nɛ hyɛ e tsui mi kekle loko e ye abolo ɔ, nɛ e nu wai nɛ ngɛ kplu ɔ mi ɔ.
hypothesis: Nɔ nɛ ɔ nɔ nɛ e hiɛ e chumi kɛɛ klɛlɛko e ye abolo ɔ, nɛ e nu ngua nɛ e nga kple o mio.

reference: Ejakaa nɔ nɛ yeɔ abolo ɔ, nɛ e nuɔ wai ngɛ kplu ɔ mi kɛkɛ, nɛ e susuu we Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ nɔmlɔ tso ɔ he, kɛ nɔ́ nɛ e ji ɔ, Mawu maa gbla e tue.
hypothesis: E ya kano no yoo abolo, ne enu nwa ngue kuro mi keke, ne esu sue nno ncheo na nwo choo he. Kanno ne ejo, ma ngma gbahi tso.

reference: Enɛ ɔ he nɛ nyɛ ti nihi fuu gbɔjɔ, nɛ a be he wami, nɛ nihi babauu hu gbo ɔ nɛ.
hypothesis: Nɛɛnɛ hɛɛ nɛ nyɛti nɛɛ nɛɛ fu gbojo, nɛɛ abɛhe wami, nɛɛ nii baba nɛɛ guo.

reference: Se ke wɔ nitsɛmɛ wa maa kojo wa he anɔkuale mi kekle ɔ, Mawu be wa tue gblae.
hypothesis: zeke wanitɛ muɔmɔ ko jowaa eɛ, anɔ kwale mi ke kleeɔ. maɔmbe watoe gbla eɛ.

reference: Se Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ kojoɔ wɔ, nɛ e gblaa wa tue, bɔ nɛ pee nɛ nyagbe ɔ, Mawu nɛ ko bu wɔ fɔ kɛ piɛ je ɔ he.
hypothesis: Se nyɛmɛɛ kɔjɔɔwɔ nɛ e gba wateɛ. Bɔnɛ pɛ nɛ e nyagbeɔ mɔ, ma wunɛ kɔbuɔ fɔkɛ pia jeɔ.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, ye nyɛmimɛ, ke nyɛ nya ba bua, nɛ nyɛ maa ye Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ niye ní ɔ, nyɛɛ mlɛ nyɛ sibi.
hypothesis: Lɔɔ hiɔ. Ye nyɛ mi mɛ, kenye nyɛ wa bua, nɛ nyɛ ma ye nyɔɔnɔ nyɛ nɛɛ nyɛɛ, nyɛ mli nyɛ si bɔɔ.

reference: Se ke hwɔ ngɛ nɔ ko yee ɔ, e ye ní ngɛ we mi lolo, bɔ nɛ pee nɛ nyɛ he nya buami ɔ kó ba pee tue gblami mohu ha nyɛ. Níhi nɛ piɛ ɔ, ke i ba su kɛkɛ ma to blɔ nya.
hypothesis: Yoo, kɛɛ mo ngɛ nɛɛ kɔɔ yɛɛ. E yɛɛ nɛɛ ngɛ wɛɛ mi lolo. Bɔ nɛɛ pɛɛ nɛɛ ye hɛɛ nyɛɛ, bɔ mi ooh, kɔ ba pɛɛ tɔɔ gbe mi bo huu ha nyɛ. Niinɛɛ pɛɛ o, kɛɛ i ba sukuu kɛɛ ma tɔ blɔ nya.

reference: Daa otsi mi kekleekle ligbi ɔ, sika nɛ nyɛ ti nɔ tsuaa nɔ naa ngɛ otsi ɔ mi ɔ, e je eko ngɔ to, nɛ e hi nya buae. Kɛkɛ ɔ, ke i ba a, e be hiae kaa a tsu sika hu.
hypothesis: Daɔɛ o kɛɛ mɛ kɛɛ kɛɛli gbɛɔ. Sika nɛ nyɛɛ ti nɛ cwaa no nange o cii o miɔ. Eje ɛkɛ ngɔ tɔ nɛ ɛ hɛ nyɛ bwa e. Kɛɛ kɛɛ o kɛ iba. Ebe hɛ yaɛ kɛɛ a cɛɛ sika.

reference: Ke i ba a, ma tsɔ nihi nɛ nyɛ nitsɛmɛ nyɛ buu mɛ kɛ womi, konɛ a ngɔ nyɛ nike ní ɔ kɛ ya Yerusalem.
hypothesis: Ke iba Macho ni ne nyɛɛ kɛ mi nyɛɛ buu me kɛ o mi, kɔni angoni kɛɛ nɛɛ o kɛ ya Yerusalem.

reference: Nɛ ke e hia kaa imi hu ma ya a, i kɛ mɛ maa ya.
hypothesis: Nyɛ kɛ ɛɛ ya kaɛi munyu maya. I kɛɛ mɛ maya. Maya gu Makedonia lo ko ma banyɛ ngɔ. E ja kaɛ i tɔ yɛɛ i mi kaɛi maya

reference: Eko ɔ, ma hi nyɛ ngɔ be saii, nɛ ma ye fĩɛ be ɔ po ngɛ nyɛ ngɔ. Lɔ ɔ se ɔ, nyɛ maa wo mi blɔ kɛ ya he tsuaa he nɛ ma yaa.
hypothesis: Eko. Mahe nyɛ ngɔɔ bɛ sai. Nɛ ma ye fie biɔ ɔ pɔngɔ nyɛ ngɔɔ, lo sɔe ɔ. Nyɛma wa mi blɔkɛ yaa he jua he nɛ ma ya

reference: Enɛ ɔ lɛɛ i sume kaa ma ba na nyɛ kpiti kɛkɛ nɛ ma je. Ke Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ maa ngmɛ blɔ ɔ, i heɔ yeɔ kaa ma kɛ ngɛ nyɛ ngɔ.
hypothesis: Ɛnɛ ɔ, lɛɛ e ji ma kɛ mɔ bɛɛ nɛ nyɛ kwɛ ti kɛ kɛɛ ne ma je. Kɛɛ nyɛmɔ ce amɛ nɛ ma mɛ blo. I hiɔ yoo kɛ ama kɛ ngɛ nyɛmɔ.

reference: Blɔ bli ha mi ngɛ hiɛ ɔ nɛ ma tsu ní saminya, se kɛ̃ ɔ, nihi nɛ teɔ si woɔ mi ɔ, mɛ hu a ngɛ hiɛ ɔ babauu.
hypothesis: Ble blee ha mi nge hiɔ ne ma chuni saminya. Sɛ ke o ni ne te osi wo mi o, me hu a nge hiɔ babao.

reference: Nyɛ ti nɔ ko nɛ ko bu lɛ kaa pi nɔ ko ji lɛ. Se mohu nyɛɛ hyɛ, konɛ e tsa e blɔ hiami ɔ nɔ ngɛ tue mi jɔmi mi. I ngɛ blɔ hyɛe kaa e kɛ nyɛmimɛ ɔmɛ maa kpale kɛ ba.
hypothesis: nyɛngmɔɔ nyɛ he lɛ hiɛmɔ nɛɛ ekoyɛ gbeyɛ. Eja ka alɛɛ nyɛmɔ tɛonɛ nɛɛ chumianɔnɛ e nɛɛ chuo ekai mi. Nyɛ tinnɔ kɔnɛ ko bulɛ kan pinɔ kɔjilɛ, se mɔ hun nyɛ hiɛ, ko nɛ echa eblohiamionɛ twɛmɛ jɔmi mi. Ingɛ blohia e kan e kɛ nyɛ mii mɛɛo mɛɛ mɛ kpalɛ kɛ ba.

reference: Jehanɛ ɔ, nɔ́ nɛ kɔɔ wa nyɛmi Apolo ɔ he ji nɛ ɔ nɛ. I kpa lɛ pɛɛ hluu kaa e kɛ nyɛmimɛ kpa amɛ nɛ a ba slaa nyɛ ngɛ Korinto, se e to kaa amlɔ nɛ ɔ lɛɛ e be nyɛe maa ba. Pee se ke e ba na blɔ hu e maa ba.
hypothesis: ya ne, nu ne ko o gba nye mi a poluo he jine o ne, e kwale pe lu ka e ka nye mi me pa amene a ba sira nye, nge korinto, se e to ka amle no le, e be nye ma ba. pe se ke e ba na blo hu e ma ba.

reference: Nyɛɛ huɔ; nyɛɛ hɛɛ hemi kɛ yemi ɔ mi wawɛɛ; nyɛɛ pee kã, nɛ nyɛ he nɛ wa.
hypothesis: Nyerua nyɛ he he ni kɛye miomi wawe. Nyɛ peka, ne nyɛ he ni

reference: Nyɛɛ kɛ suɔmi nɛ pee nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́.
hypothesis: Nyɛ kɛɛ asome ne, pe nɔɔ chuane.

reference: nyɛɛ ba nyɛ he si ha nihi kaa kikɛ nɛ ɔ, kɛ ni nɛmɛ tsuo nɛ i kɛ mɛ tsuɔ ní ɔ.
hypothesis: Nyɛ ba nyɛɛɛ si ha nɛɛ kɛɛ kɛɛnɛ o. Kɛɛ nɛɛ me cuo ni kɛɛ me cuo ni o.

hypothesis: Sé ke, ye ma be mitue bo

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, gbi slɔɔtohi a tumi ji okadi kɛ ha nihi nɛ he we yi, pi ni nɛmɛ nɛ heɔ yeɔ. Sane kpakpa a fiɛmi lɛɛ nihi nɛ heɔ yeɔ ɔ a we okadi ji lɔ ɔ nɛ, pi ni nɛmɛ nɛ he we yi.
hypothesis: La hio. Biswa toi aatomeji okadi ke hanni ne he weyi, pi ni ne mene hio yoo. Sani kpakpa fia mi le, ni ne hio yoo awe okadi jilo ne, pi ni ne mene he weyi.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, ke asafo ɔ tsuo nya ba bua, nɛ nɔ tsuaa nɔ bɔni gbi slɔɔtohi tumi, nɛ ni komɛ nɛ mɛɛ a li mi eko, aloo a he we yi ba lejɛ ɔ, anɛ a be dee ke nyɛ tsuo nyɛ ngɛ godo nue lo?
hypothesis: Laa hio, kɛɛ asafo otuɔnyɛ babua, nɛɛ nɔ tuɔ ne bonɛ gbi srootoo itumii, nɛɛ nɛɛ kɔmɛ nɛɛ mɛɛ alii miɛɛ ko, aloo ahɛɛ o yibale jiɔnɛ, ani abɛ dɛɛ kɛɛ nyɛ tuɔ nyɛngɛ godonoɔ yɛ.

reference: Se ke nɔ tsuaa nɔ ngɛ Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ fiɛe, nɛ nɔ ko nɛ lɛɛ e he we yi, aloo e li mi eko ba lejɛ ɔ, níhi nɛ a ngɛ dee ɔ ma ha nɛ e maa na e he yayami. Níhi nɛ e nu ɔ tsuo maa kojo lɛ.
hypothesis: Zekɔ nɔ chuɔ nɔ ngɛ mɔɔ se gbi ɔ mi e. Nɛ nɛ kɔdɛ lɛ e he wɛ yi. Alo eli mi ɛɛ ko bale jɔɔ? Ni inɛ angɛ de ɔ ma ha nɛ ɛ ma naa he yaya mi. Ni inɛ ɛ nɔɔ chuɔ ma kɔ jɔle.

reference: E tsui mi laami sanehi tsuo maa je kpo paa; e ma kpla si ma ja Mawu, nɛ e maa jaje ke, “Niinɛ, Mawu kɛ nyɛ ngɛ!”
hypothesis: E chu mi la mi sa ne e cho ma je ko pa e ma pa si ma ja ma ne e ma ja je ke ni ne ma n ke nge nge.

reference: Ye nyɛmimɛ, nɔ́ nɛ i ngɛ tsɔɔe ɔ ji, ke nyɛ nya ba bua kɛ ha Mawu jami ɔ, nyɛ ti nɔ kake nɛ je la, nɔ ko nɛ tsɔɔ ní, nɛ nɔ ko hu nɛ ha sɛ gbi nɛ je Mawu ngɔ. Nɔ kpa nɛ tu gbi slɔɔtohi, konɛ nɔ kpa ko hu nɛ tsɔɔ sisi. Nyɛɛ pee níhi tsuo ngɛ a blɔ nɔ kɛ ha asafo ɔ nɔ yami.
hypothesis: ye nyɛ ni nɛ nɔ nɛ e nga chuo o yo ji kɛ nyɛ nyɛ aba bua kɛ ha ma u jamɛ o nyɛ ti no kakɛ nɛ jɛ la nɔ ko nɛ chuoni nɛ nɔ ko nɛ ha se bɛ nɛ jɛ ma nɔ ngɔ nɔ kɔ nɛ tu bi srɔtɔ hi kɔ nɛ nɔ kɔ hu nɛ chuon sisi nyɛ pɛ ni nɛ chuon ngɛ ablo nɛ kɛ ha asafonu o yami

reference: Ke a ngɛ gbi slɔɔtohi tue ɔ, nɔ kake nɛ tu nɛ e gbe nya loko nɔ kpa hu nɛ ba. Ke munyu tuli ɔmɛ a he hiɛ hluu ɔ, e pee ni etɛ pɛ, konɛ nɔ ko nɛ je nɔ́ nɛ a ngɛ dee ɔ sisi.
hypothesis: Ke anɛɛ bi swɔɔ tɔe tue, nyɔɔ nɔ kɛɛ kɛ nɛɛ tue e gbenya, loko nɔ kpa nɔ ne ba. Ke mu nyu tɔe lɔɔ mɛɛ ayi e luɔ, e pɛɛ ni e tepɛ kɔɔ nɛɛ kɔɔ ne je nɛɛ anɛɛ de ɔ si?

reference: Se ke nɔ ko be lejɛ ɔ nɛ maa tsɔɔ sisi ɔ, lɛɛ nɔ nɛ ngɛ gbi slɔɔtohi tue ɔ nɛ pee dii; e tu munyu ha lɛ nɔ kake e he, kɛ Mawu.
hypothesis: Tsɛke nɛ ko bɛ le jɔnɛ ma ko ji si yɔɔ. Lɛ nɛ nɛ ngɛ gbe sɔtɔɔ nɛ e nɛ pɛɛ diɛ, e tumu ngɛ nɔha le nɛ o ka ke ehe, ke ma

reference: Ni enyɔ, loo etɛ nɛ ná Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ nɛ a tu munyu, konɛ ni nɛmɛ nɛ piɛ ɔ nɛ a susu he.
hypothesis: Ni enyo. Lo etene namo se gbeo ne atumuno. Kone ni nemi ne piao ne asusu he.

reference: Se ke nɔ ko hii si ngɛ lejɛ ɔ nɛ Mawu je nɔ́ ko tsɔɔ lɛ ɔ, nɔ nɛ ngɛ munyu tue ɔ nɛ kpa.
hypothesis: Dɛkɛ nɛ ko hĩɛ si ngɛ lɛ jɛɔ. Nɛ maa jɛ nɛ ko chɔ lɛ ɔ, nɛ nɛɛ ga munyu tuɔ nɛ ko.

reference: Nyɛ tsuo nyɛ ma nyɛ maa fiɛ Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ kakaaka, konɛ nɔ tsuaa nɔ nɛ kase ní, nɛ e ya nɔ.
hypothesis: Nyɛ tsɔnyɛ manyɛ mafiɛ maa onɛɛ gbɛ yɔɔ kakaaka. Koni nɛɛ tsɔnyɛ o ni kasɛɛ ni nɛɛ eyɛ.

reference: Nɔ nɛ a dloo lɛ Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ fiɛmi ɔ, e hia kaa e hyɛ e munyu tumi saminya, nɛ e le he nɛ sa kaa e tu munyu kɛ ya si.
hypothesis: Nɛɛ adrɔlɛ maa hɛɛ kɛ ya mii ya nɔ, e hiɛ kaa e hie e munyu tu mi saminya, nɛɛ ele hɛɛ nɛɛ sakaa e tu munyu kɛ yaa su.

reference: Mawu sume basabasa, se mohu tue mi jɔmi e suɔ.
hypothesis: Ma hũ kɛɛ basabasa. Se mɔɔ tsuo mi jwɛŋmi e suɔ.

reference: Bɔ nɛ níhi ngɛ ngɛ Mawu we asafo ɔmɛ tsuo a mi ji nɛ ɔ nɛ.
hypothesis: Banɛ ni hingɛ nɛ ma we asafo amɛ tso amɛ ji nɛɔ.

reference: Ke nyɛ kpe nɛ nyɛ ngɛ Mawu jae ɔ, yi ɔmɛ nɛ a pee dii. A ngmɛ́ mɛ blɔ nɛ a tu munyu, mohu a ba a he si kaa bɔ nɛ Mose mlaa a hu tsɔɔ ɔ.
hypothesis: ganyaapee nɛ nyɛngma mawu jayoɔ yoo mɛni haa pɛɛdiɛ angmɛɛmɛ blɔ nɛ atumunyoo mɔhun aba ayɛɛsɛ nɛ kaabɔnɛ mɔse mlaahu cɔɔ

reference: Ke nɔ́ ko ngɛ nɛ a ngɛ hlae nɛ a le ɔ, a bi a hunomɛ ngɛ we mi. Ke asafo ɔ ba bua nɛ a ngɛ Mawu jae ɔ, e ji zo kaa yo maa tu munyu.
hypothesis: Ke no kɔ ngɛ nɛ angɛ lae nɛ alɛɛ o? Abi amɛ nɛ o mɛ ngɛ wɛmi. Ke asafo ba buane angɛ ma ngɛ jaayɛɛ. E ji zo ka yoo ma tu mo yoo.

reference: Mawu munyu ɔ, nyɛ ngɔ nɛ e puɛ kɛ je? Aloo nyɛ kɛkɛ nyɛ ngɔ nɛ e ba su?
hypothesis: maomuñuɔ ŋeŋo ne e po ka je alo nyɛ kɛ ka ŋeŋo ne e ba

reference: Ke e peeɔ nɔ ko kaa gbalɔ ji lɛ, aloo kaa e ngɛ mumi mi nike ní ko ɔ, e na nɛ e le kaa níhi nɛ i ngɛ nyɛ ngmae nɛ ɔ, Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ biɛ mi i ngɛ ngmae ngɛ.
hypothesis: Ke e piɔɔ ne ko ka gba lo jile, alo ka e nga mumuni kɛni kpoo, e nani e le ka, niine e nga nyɔŋma enɛ o, nyɔŋma o biɛmi e nga gba enɛ.

reference: Ke nɔ ko bui enɛ ɔ, nyɛ hu nyɛ ko pee nɔ ɔ he akɔtaa.
hypothesis: Ke nɛ ko bui e nɔɔ, nya wunye ko bɛɛ nɔɔ he akɔta.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, ye nyɛmimɛ, nyɛ hɛ nɛ dɔ ngɛ Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ fiɛmi he, se kɛ̃ ɔ, nyɛ ko tsi gbi slɔɔtohi a tumi nya.
hypothesis: Lo he o. Nyɛ nyɛmi me, nyɛ he ni dɔngɛ maun se gbɛo fiɛ mi he. Se kɛɛ o, nyɛ ko tsu gbɛ suɔ tɔin atu mi ne.

reference: Á pee nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́ bɔ nɛ sa ngɛ blɔ nya tomi nya.
hypothesis: Apeenuo tsua nɛ bo nɛ sanga blo nya tu minya.

reference: Nyɛmimɛ, anɔkuale mi ɔ, i nyɛ we nɛ i kɛ nyɛ nɛ tu munyu kaa bɔ nɛ i kɛ nihi nɛ mumi ɔ ngɛ a mi ɔ tuɔ munyu. Se mohu, i kɛ nyɛ tu munyu kaa je mi bi, aloo bimwɔwi ngɛ Kristo jami mi.
hypothesis: nye mi me, anɛ kɛɛ niɛ miɔ, inyɛ wɛ nɛ ikɛ yɛɛ tumu nyu, ka mbo nɛ ikɛɛ niɛ mu miɔ kɛ a miɔ tuo mu nyu, se mo ho, ikɛɛ nyɛ tumu nyu kɛɛ jɛ mi bi. Alo bi mɔ wiɛ ngɛ Kristo jɛ mi.

reference: I ha nyɛ nyɔ nyu, se pi niye ní nɛ jiɔ; ejakaa jamɛ a be ɔ, nyɛ nyɛ we nɛ nyɛɛ ye niye ní nɛ jiɔ. Amlɔ nɛ ɔ tete po nyɛ nyɛ we kɛ mwɔɔ.
hypothesis: Mihanɛ nyonnyo sεɛ pii nɛ ni nɛ jiɔ ɛ ja kaa ajamabeɔ nyonnyowɛ nɛ nyɛyɛɛni nɛ jiɔ. Amlo nɛ ɔ tete po nyonnyowɛ kɛmu.

reference: Nyɛ ngɛ he lo nya kɛ mwɔɔ, ejakaa nɔ́ nɛ je mi bi peeɔ ɔ, lɔ ɔ nyɛ hu nyɛ peeɔ. Be abɔ nɛ hunga jemi, kɛ pɛ ngɛ nyɛ kpɛti kɛ mwɔɔ ɔ, anɛ enɛ ɔ tsɔɔ we kaa je mi bi ji nyɛ lo? Nɔ́ nɛ nɔ tsuaa nɔ peeɔ ɔ, anɛ pi lɔ ɔ nɔuu nɛ nyɛ hu nyɛ ngɛ pee ɔ lo?
hypothesis: Nɛ ngɛ he lo nɛ a kɛ muɔ. Ɛɛ, ja kɛ nɛ, no nɛ jemi bi pe o, lo nɛ o hu nɛ pe o, bɛ abɔ nɛ huɔ ngɛ jemi, ke tɛɛ ngɛ nɛ kwɛti kɛ muɔ. Anaɛ, ɛnɛ o tsu we kɛ gã jemi bi ji nyɛ lo. No nɛ o tsuɔ anɔ pe o, anaɛ, pi lo nɛ o nyɛ huɔ nɛ pe o lo.

reference: Ke nɔ ko ke, “Paulo nɔ ji mi”, nɛ nɔ ko hu ke, “Imi lɛɛ Apolo nɔ ji mi” ɔ, anɛ pi nɔ́ nɛ je mi bi peeɔ nɛ nyɛ ngɛ pee nɛ ɔ?
hypothesis: Kɛɛ nɛ ko ke, Paulo nɔ jimi. Nɛ nɛ ko ke, imɛ lɛ Apollo nɔ jimi o. Anɛ, pi nɛnɛ jimi bi pio nɛ nyɛ nyɛ ngɛ peɛnɛ o?

reference: Mɛnɔ ji Apolo ɔ? Imi Paulo hu, mɛnɔ ji mi? Mawu tsɔli kɛkɛ ji wɔ, nɛ wa nɔ lɛ nyɛ gu kɛ he Kristo ye. Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ ha wa ti nɔ tsuaa nɔ ní tsumi pɔtɛɛ nɛ wa tsu.
hypothesis:
mene ji Apollo
Emi Paul o hun.
Mene ji mi?
Ma won chole ka ke ji wo.
Ne wano lenyagungu ka he Kristo ye.
Nyom chao hun wa tino chwano ni chumi pote he ne wano

reference: Imi lɛ i ba ma tso ɔ. Apolo ba pue nɔ nyu, se Mawu lɛ ha nɛ tso ɔ wa.
hypothesis: Kɛɛ mɛ lɛ, eema. Papolo bapɛɛ nɔ nyu. Sɛɛ mɔ le hane ewo.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, nɔ nɛ duɔ tso, kɛ nɔ nɛ pueɔ nɔ nyu ɔ, a he hia we kulaa. Mawu ji nɔ nɛ he hia, ejakaa lɛ nɛ haa nɛ tso ɔ waa.
hypothesis: Lɔɔ he ɔ nɔ́ née duɔ́ɔ, kɛnɛɛ puɔ nɔ́ nyuɔɔ. Ayiɛ nyɛɛ kwɛɛ. Mawu ji nɔ́ née heyiɛ. Ejaake anɛɛ haane shwoo wa.

reference: Nɔ nɛ duɔ tso, kɛ nɔ nɛ pueɔ nɔ nyu ɔ, slɔɔto be a kpɛti; Mawu maa wo a ti nɔ tsuaa nɔ hiɔ kpakpa ngɛ ní tsumi nɛ e tsu ɔ he.
hypothesis: Nane dumo cho, kane nɛɛ pɛo no nyuɔ, srato bɛ apɛti, mɔmɔ wo ati no choa anueɛ kpakpa, ngɛ nɛɛ chumi nɛɛ e chuoɔ.

reference: Wɔɔ lɛɛ Mawu tsɔli nɛ pee kake kɛ ngɛ ní tsue ji wɔ. Nyɛɛ lɛɛ nyɛ ngɛ kaa ngmɔ nɛ Mawu ngɛ ní tsue ngɛ mi. Nyɛ ngɛ kaa tsu nɛ Mawu ngɛ fiae.
hypothesis: wɔ lɛ maa koɔli nɛɛ kɛ kɛ kɛ ngɛ ni chuɔ eji wo. Nyiɛ lɛ nyɛ ngɛ kamɔ nɛ maa ngɛ ni chuɔ ngɛ mi, nyiɛ ngɛ ka chu nɛ maa ngɛ fia.

reference: I ngɔ Mawu dloomi nɛ e ha mi ɔ, nɛ i kɛ to tsu ɔ sisi kaa tsu fialɔ kpanaa nɛ le ga tsuɔ ní; nɛ nɔ kpa ba ngɛ nɔ fiae. Se e hia kaa nɔ tsuaa nɔ nɛ hyɛ kaa e ngɛ tsu ɔ fiae saminya ngɛ sisi tomi ɔ nɔ lo.
hypothesis: Ní nguamá dɔminɛ́ ehíɛ́ mǐɔ́, nɛ́ íkɛ́ tócuɔ́n sísí kɛ́ nɔ́ cúáshálo kpàná á nɛ́ lé gátcuɔ́ɔ́n nǐ, nɛ́ nɔ́ kpɔbá nɛ́ nɔ́ fíɛ́, sé éhíɛ́ gá nɛ́ cúá nɛ́ nɛ́ íhé kǎn. É gátcuɔ́ɔ́n fíɛ́ sâmí nyá ngá sísí tɔ́ míɔ́ nɔ́ lɔ.

reference: Ejakaa Mawu ngɔ Yesu Kristo ngɔ to momo kaa sisi tomi, nɛ nɔ ko be nyɛe maa to sisi kpa ko hu.
hypothesis: E ya kɛ mɔ ngɔ Yehowa Kristo ngɔ tɔ mɔɔ kɛ si si tɔ mi. Nɛɛ nɛ ko bɛ nɛ ma tɔ si si pa ko.

reference: Ni komɛ maa ngɔ sika tsu, loo sika hiɔ, loo tɛ nɛ he jua wa kɛ fia sisi tomi ɔ nɔ; ni komɛ hu maa ngɔ tso, loo gla, loo nga kɛ pee.
hypothesis: Nikome mango si katsu, lo si kayo, lo tene he jo wa ke fiya si lito miono, Nikome o mango cho, lo gla, lo ngakepe.

reference: Se ligbi ɔ nɛ Kristo maa ba a, nɔ tsuaa nɔ ní nɛ e tsu ɔ maa je kpo paa. Ejakaa jamɛ a ligbi ɔ, a kɛ la ma je nɔ tsuaa nɔ ní tsumi kpo. La a maa tsɔɔ bɔ nɛ nɔ tsuaa nɔ ní tsumi ngɛ ha.
hypothesis: Tɛɛ li gbe nɛ kristo ma ba, no nɛ cuaa noni ne ɛ hu ɔ ma je po pa. E ja kɛ nɛ je ma li gbe ɔ. Akɛ la ma je no cuaa noni nɛ cu mi po. La ma cuɔ bɔ nɛ no cuaa noni nɛ cu mi ngɛ hɔ.

reference: Ke nɔ ko fia tsu ngɔ fɔ sisi tomi ɔ nɔ, nɛ la sa he, se tsu ɔ daa si kɛ mwɔɔ ɔ, tsu fialɔ ɔ ma na hiɔwo kpakpa.
hypothesis: Ke no ko fi haa tunge fɔ si ni e to mi no, ne la sa he. Se tunge dasi ke muo, tunge fia lo ma na hiɛ o kpa

reference: Ke nɔ ɔ tsu ɔ sã a, nɔ́ laa lɛ; se lɛ nitsɛ lɛɛ a ma he e yi wami kaa nɔ ko nɛ a gbla lɛ kɛ je la mi.
hypothesis: Keɛ nɔ tsuɔ saa nɔ lale. Sɛɛ lɛ ni tjelɛ ama he e i wami kanɔ ko ni agbale kɛ jɛ lamli.

reference: Ke nɔ ko puɛ Mawu sɔlemi we ɔ, Mawu ma kpata e hɛ mi. Ejakaa Mawu sɔlemi we ɔ ngɛ klɔuklɔu, nɛ nyɛ ji sɔlemi we ɔ nɛ.
hypothesis: Ga nɛ ko kɛɛ ma amɔ sɔlemi wuo. Ma amɔ kɛ patã ɛhe mi, ɛja ka ma amɔ sɔlemi wuo nɛ kron-kron, nɛ nyɛ ji sɔlemi wuo nɛ.

reference: Nyɛ ti nɔ ko nɔ ko kó sisi e he. Ke nyɛ ti nɔ ko susuu kaa lɛɛ e le ní pe nɔ tsuaa nɔ ɔ, é pee e he kuasia. Kɛkɛ ɔ, e maa pee ní lelɔ nitsɛnitsɛ.
hypothesis: Nyɛti nɔ kɔnɔ gba koɔ si ɛhɛ. Kɛ nyɛti nɔ kɔ susu kaa lɛ ɛlɛ ni pɛ nɔ chuano. Epɛ ɛhɛ kwasia. Kɛkɛɔ, emapɛ ni le lonice ni ce.

reference: Ejakaa nɔ́ nɛ je ɔ buu kaa nile ɔ ji kuasia nɔ́ ko ngɛ Mawu lɛɛ e hɛ mi. Ngmami ɔ ke, “Mawu ngɔɔ nile kɛ tsɔɔ ní leli klama.”
hypothesis: Enyɛ kaa nɛ ni jɔɔbu kɛɛ ni le ɔ, ji kwasianɔ kɛ ngɛ ma ngɛ mi. Ngmami ɔ ke. Ma ngɔ ni le kɛɛ chɔ ni le li klaami

reference: Ngmami ɔ kpa hu ke, “Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ le kaa ní leli a yi mi tomi peeɔ yaka.”
hypothesis: Ma mi o pa hu ke? Nyam tso le ka ni le li, ayi mi to mi pio ya.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, nɔ ko nɔ ko kó fĩa ngɔ fɔ adesa ko nɔ, ejakaa mɛ tsuo a ngɛ ha nyɛ;
hypothesis: Lɔɔ heɔ. Nɔ kɔɔ nɔ kɔɔ kɔfiɛ ngɔɔ fɔɔ adesra kɔɔ nɔ. E ja kɛɛmɛɛ cuu angɛ kɛɛ hanyɛ.

reference: Paulo jio, Apolo jio, Petro jio, je nɛ ɔ jio, wami jio, gbenɔ jio, amlɔ nɛ ɔ jio, hwɔɔ se jio, ní nɛ ɔmɛ tsuo ngɛ ha nyɛ.
hypothesis: Paolo jio, Apollo jio, Petro jio, Genio jio, Wami jio, Bueno jio, Amlonelio jio, Huase jio, Nino me chonge hanyo.

reference: Nyɛ hu Kristo níhi ji nyɛ, nɛ Kristo ɔ, Mawu nɔ ji lɛ.
hypothesis: Nyɔŋmɔ Kristo nɛ ji nyɛ nɛ Kristoɔ, ma hao ji lɛ.

reference: Nyɛɛ bu wɔ kaa Kristo tsɔli nɛ Mawu ngɔ laami sɛ gbi ɔ ngɔ ha wɔ ke waa fiɛ.
hypothesis: Nɛɛ buɔ ka Kristo cɔli. Nɛɛ ma ngɔɔ laa mi sɛgwi ɔ ngɔɔ haa wɔ ke wa fie.

reference: Nɔ́ nɛ a ngɛ hlae ngɛ tsɔli kaa kikɛ nɛ ɔ a dɛ ji kaa a ye anɔkuale ha a nyɔmtsɛ ɔ.
hypothesis: Nɔ nɛ́ a ngɛɛ lae nɛ́ e kɛ́ alikan kɛ kɛɛnɔɔ adɛɛ jikan, aye anu kpalɛhɛ anyɔmɔɔ ce.

reference: Imi lɛɛ nɔ́ nɛ nyɛ, aloo ni kpahi susuɔ ngɛ ye he ɔ hɛwi mi; imi nitsɛ po, i kojo we ye he.
hypothesis: Emi le, noni nyɛ. Alo ni peɛ susuɔ ngɛ he o he wii mi. Emi ni chepo, iko jowe ye hi

reference: Ye he nile tete bui mi fɔ, se enɛ ɔ tsɔɔ we kaa lɔ ɔ he ɔ, i yeɔ nguɔ. Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ ji nɔ nɛ kojoɔ mi.
hypothesis: ya hɛni le tete bue mi fo. Se ɛna o choɔ we ka nlo he o, i yi o nguo. Nyo choo jina ne kojo o mi.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, nyɛ ko kojo nɔ ko loko be ɔ nɛ su. Nyɛɛ mlɛ kɛ yaa si Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ maa ba. Ke e ba a, e ma je diblii mi níhi, kɛ tsui mi ní yayahi nɛ a kɛ laa a tsuo kpo. Jamɛ a be ɔ, nɔ tsuaa nɔ ma na yi jemi nɛ sa lɛ ɔ kɛ je Mawu dɛ mi.
hypothesis: Lɔɔ hee, nyɛko kojɔɔnɔ kɛlɛkɔ biɔɔ nɛɛsu nyɛmlɛke asi nyɔŋɔ tsee omaba kɛɛba e maajɛɛ diblii minihi kɛ chu mini yamyi nɛɛ akɛ laa chuɔkpo. Jamabioo nɔchuaa nɔ mane yuu jɛɛ mini saalaa kɛ jɛɛ maudɛɛn.

reference: Ye nyɛmimɛ, nyɛ he ɔ, i ngɔ imi, kɛ Apolo ngɔ pee nɔ hyɛmi nɔ́ ha nyɛ, konɛ nyɛɛ kase wɔ, nɛ nyɛ ko je nɔ́ nɛ a ngma a se ya pee nɔ́ kpa ko. Nyɛ ti nɔ ko nɔ ko kó wó e he nɔ; nɔ ko kó bu nɔ ko nɔmlɔ ngua pe nɔ ko.
hypothesis: Nyɛ nyɛ mi nɛɛ. Nyɛ hio, ningo imi nɛɛ ke Apolo ngɛ fe nɛɛ, hye mi no hanye. Konɛ nyɛ kaseo, nɛɛ nyɛ ko jɛɛ no nɛɛ agwa se yapɛ nɛɛ pako. Nyɛ ti nɛɛ kɛ kɔkɔwo e hɛɛ nɛɛ, ka e ma buo no kɛ nɛɛ ngua pɛ nɛɛ.

reference: Mɛnɔ lɛ pee mo slɔɔto pe ni kpahi? Mɛni ngɛ o dɛ nɛ pi Mawu nɛ ha mo? Ke Mawu lɛ ha mo ɔ, lɛɛ mɛni he je mɔ nɛ o fĩaa kaa nɔ́ nɛ pi nɛ a kɛ ke mo ɔ?
hypothesis: Me no le pe mo suro to pe ni pe he. Miniga o de ne pi mau ne hambo. Ke mau le hambo o, le mine je mo de ofia ka no ne pi ne a ke kemo.

reference: Tse nyɛ ná nɔ́ tsuaa nɔ́ nɛ hia nyɛ! Tse nyɛ ná ní momo! Nyɛ ngɛ matsɛ yee, be mi nɛ wɔɔ lɛɛ wa be nɔ́ ko mi; pi jã? I na nɛ nyɛ ngɛ matsɛ yee niinɛ, konɛ waa piɛ nyɛ he kɛ ye.
hypothesis: Chenye nɛɛ nu chu a nɔɔ nɛɛ hee nyɛ he. Chenye nɛɛ ni momo nyɛ ngɛɛ ma chɛɛ yɛ. Bɛ minɛɛ wale wa bɛ nɔ ko mi. Pijaa, inɛɛ nɛɛ nyɛ ngɛɛ ma chɛɛ yɛ nɛɛ ne. Koni wa piɛɛ nɛɛ he kɛɛ.

reference: Ejakaa e peeɔ mi kaa Mawu ngɔ wɔ bɔfo ɔmɛ ngɔ pee sekpɛli. Wa ngɛ kaa nihi nɛ a bu mɛ gbenɔ fɔ, konɛ a gbe mɛ ngɛ ma hɛ mi, nɛ je ɔ, hiɔwe bɔfohi, kɛ adesahi tsuo nɛ na mɛ.
hypothesis: Eyakane, ehyoemikane, mangua wa bafo wami nguopesekole. Wange kani ni ne abumegbenofo, kone agbemenge mahemi, ne jeo, hyoewa bafo i, ke adesa ejo ne name.

reference: Kristo he ɔ, wa plɛ kuasiahi, se nyɛɛ lɛɛ nyɛ ba pee ní leli! Wa gbɔjɔ, se nyɛɛ lɛɛ nyɛ he mi ba wa nyɛ! Nyɛ hɛ mi ba nyami, se wɔɔ lɛɛ wa hɛ mi pue si.
hypothesis: Kɛɛ sɔɔ hɛɛ. Waa plɛɛ kwasiahɛɛ. Sɛɛ nyɛ lɛɛ nyɛba pɛɛni leli. Waa gbo jɔɔ. Sɛɛ nyɛ lɛɛ nyɛ hɛɛ mi ba wanyaɛ. Nyɛ hɛɛ mi ba nyɔɔ mi. Sɛɛ walee waa hɛɛ mi kwasia

reference: Kɛ ba si amlɔ nɛ ɔ tete po hwɔ kɛ kuma yee wɔ; wa heha níhi híaa ngɛ wa he; a kongoɔ wɔ, nɛ wa hii kpae kɛ hii bee.
hypothesis: ke bɛɛ ya no ne tete po, hwo ke kumu ye wo, wahiha ni hiɛ agi wahi, aku wo, ni wahi kpa ike hibi

reference: Waa kɛ wa nine nguɛ nyɔngma tsuɔ ní. Ke nihi ngɛ wɔ jɛe ɔ, wɔɔ lɛɛ wa gbaa mɛ; ke a ngɛ wɔ yi mi wae ɔ, wa toɔ wa tsui si.
hypothesis: Wakɛ wa ninɛ nɛ wa nyɛ wa chuoni. Kɛ nɛ inge waje yo, walɛ wa gba mɛ, kɛ angɛ o yimi wayo wa tuo, wa chuisi.

reference: Ke a ngɛ wa biɛ puɛe ɔ, wa bɔɔ mɔde kaa wɔɔ lɛɛ wa maa tu he jɔmi munyu. Je ɔ buu wɔ kaa kuku kɛ ba si mwɔnɛ ɔ.
hypothesis: Kɛɛ angɛɛ wa biɛ pɔɔ yeɔ, wa bɔmɔ dekan, wa le wa ma tɔɔ he jɔmi munyu, Jio buuɛ kɛ ku ku kɛ ba si mɔ ɛ nɛɛ?

reference: I ngmɛ́ nyɛ ní nɛ ɔmɛ nɛ ma kɛ pue nyɛ hɛ mi si, se mohu nɛ ma kɛ tu munyu kɛ tsɔɔ nyɛ kaa imi nitsɛ ye bimɛ nɛ i suɔ.
hypothesis: I munyɛ nɛ ni niɛ womɛ nɛ makɛ pɛnyɛ hɛnɛ si. Sɛɛ mɔ nɛ makɛ tumu nyu kɛ chɔ nyɛ, kɛ imi nɛ chee ye bimenɛ isuu.

reference: Nyɛ ngɛ nihi akpeakpe nɛ a ngɛ nyɛ nɔ hyɛe mohu, se nɛ nyɛ ba le Kristo ɔ, tsɛ kake pɛ lɛ nyɛ ngɛ. Ejakaa kɛ gu sane kpakpa a nɛ i ngɔ ba ha nyɛ ɔ nɔ ɔ, nyɛɛ kɛ Yesu Kristo ba bɔni bɔmi, nɛ i ba pee nyɛ tsɛ.
hypothesis: Nye nganyɛ, akuɛ akwɛɛ, anganyɛ no hiɛi mohu. Sɛɛ ne nye ba le Kristo o, tɛ ka kɛ pɛɛlɛ nye ngɛɛ. E ja kaa kɛ gu sane kpɔkpaa ne inya baa hɛɛi onuɔ. Nye kɛ Yesu Kristo ba boni bomi, ne iba pɛɛ nye tɛɛ.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, i kpa nyɛ pɛɛ nɛ nyɛ wo ye nane.
hypothesis: Laho, yí kpa nyɛpɛ nɛɛ nyɛ wo ye nane.

reference: I ngɛ Timoteo nyɛ ngɔ tsɔe ngɛ enɛ ɔ he. E ngɛ kaa imi nitsɛ ye bi fɔfɔɛ; e yeɔ mi anɔkuale, nɛ i suɔ lɛ, ejakaa e le Kristo. Ke Timoteo ba a, e ma kai nyɛ bɔ nɛ i plɛ kɛ ngɛ Yesu Kristo se nyɛɛe ha, kaa bɔ nɛ a naa ngɛ ye ní tsɔɔmi mi ngɛ asafo ɔmɛ a mi he tsuaa he ɔ.
hypothesis: ngɛɛ timotio nyɛɛ ngɔɔ choe ngɛɛ ene ɔ he. E he ka imi ni chaiyɛɛ bi fɔfɔe, e yoomi anɔ kwɛɛli nɛ isuɔle, e ja ka elɛ Kristo. Kɛɛ timotio ba, ema kaɛɛ nyɛɛ bɔlɛ i pleke ngɛɛ Yesu Kristo se nyɛɛ ha. Ka bɔnɛ anangɛɛ nɛ ni chomi mi, ngɛɛ asafomi amɛ amihɛ chuahɛ.

reference: Nyɛ ti ni komɛ susu kaa i be bae ba slaa nyɛ, nɛ lɔ ɔ he ɔ, a bɔni a he nɔ womi.
hypothesis: Nyɛ tii ni komɛɛ suɔ ka ibɛ baa ibɛ sranyɛ, nɛ lo hioo, aboni ahe nɔ wo mi.

reference: Ke Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ suɔ ɔ, e be kɛe nɛ ma ba slaa nyɛ. Ke i ba a, pi munyu nɛ kikɛmɛ a he nɔ woli nɛ ɔmɛ ngɛ tue ɔ kɛkɛ nɛ ma ba nu, se he wami nɛ a kɛ ngɛ ní tsue ɔ, ma ba na paa.
hypothesis: ke nyɛmɛɛ tsɔɔ suɔmɔ, ebe kɛɛnyɛ mɔba sra nyɛ, ke eba, pii munyuu nɛɛ kɛ kɛ ma he nɛɛ ngɛ lindɔmɛɛ kɛtuuɔ, kɛkɛ nɛɛ ma ba nu. Se hewā mi nɛɛ ake ngɛ ni juao mɔba nɛɛ pa.

reference: Ejakaa Mawu matsɛ yemi ɔ jeɔ e he kpo ngɛ adesa ní tsumi mi, se pi munyu tumi mi.
hypothesis: Ella kɛ maɔmɔ cheo mɛɔ jio e kɛ ponguɛ adesa ni chumimi. Se pi mɛnyu tumimi.

reference: Te nɔ nɛ nyɛ suɔ nɛɛ? Ke i ma nyɛ ngɔ ɔ, ma hɛɛ kpa kɛ ba, aloo ma ba ngɛ suɔmi, kɛ he jɔmi mi?
hypothesis: ke no le nyɛ suɔ ne, ke e ma nyɛ ngɔ, ma he pwa ke ba? Alo ma ba ngɛ suɔ mi ke mu mi he jɔ mi mi?

reference: Ye nyɛmimɛ, jehanɛ lɛɛ i suɔ kaa ma kai nyɛ sane kpakpa a nɛ i fiɛ ngɔ tsɔɔ nyɛ, nɛ nyɛ pɛtɛ he, nɛ lɔ ɔ nɔ nyɛ hemi kɛ yemi daa si ngɛ ɔ.
hypothesis: yɛ nyɛmimɛi, jɛ nɔ lɛ, e suɔ kɛ mɛ kai nyɛ sane kpakpaani ifiɛɛ ngɔ chɔ nyɛ, nyɛ nyɛ petehe, ni lɔ nɔ nyɛ hɛɛ mikai midasi ngɔ.

reference: Ke nyɛ pɛtɛ sane kpakpa a he wawɛɛ kaa bɔ nɛ i fiɛ tsɔɔ nyɛ ɔ, a ma he nyɛ yi wami. Ke pi jã lɛɛ nyɛ he ye yaka gu.
hypothesis: kɛnyɛ pate sã nɛɛ kpakpa he wawɛɛ kɛɛ mɔ nɛɛ ifɛɛ to nyɛ hu a ma he nyɛ yiwa mi. Kɛ pi jaa lɛ nyɛ he ya ka gbo.

reference: Ngmami ɔmɛ ke a pu lɛ, nɛ ligbi nɛ ji ligbi etɛ ɔ, a tle lɛ si kɛ ba wami mi ekohu.
hypothesis: Wami omi o chong. Wami omi ke apon le. Ne libi ne ji libi e te o. Ati le si ke ba wami mi eko.

reference: E jé e he kpo ngɔ tsɔɔ Petro; nɛ pee se ɔ, e jé e he kpo ngɔ tsɔɔ ni nyɔngma kɛ enyɔ ɔmɛ.
hypothesis: E je he pe ngo cho ni petrol. Ne pe se o. E je he pe ngo cho ni nyoma ke enyome.

reference: Jehanɛ, e jé e he kpo ngɔ tsɔɔ e se nyɛɛli maa pee lafa enuɔ kɛ se si kake. Nimli nɛ ɔmɛ a ti ni babauu ngɛ kɛ ba si mwɔnɛ ɔ, se ni komɛ hu gbo.
hypothesis: Jaane, je e po ngɔɔ nɛ o se ngɛ yeli ma pe la fa, e nuu kaa kese si ka ke. Ni mlinde o mi, a ti ni mi baba o ngɛ ke ba si mwoo nɛ o. Se ni ko mi hũ

reference: Lɔ ɔ se ɔ, e jé e he kpo ngɔ tsɔɔ Yakobo, nɛ Yakobo se ɔ, e jé e he kpo ngɔ tsɔɔ bɔfo ɔmɛ tsuo.
hypothesis: Lɔɔ sɔɔ. Ejeɔ ehe ponɔɔ tšoɔ Yakobo. Ne Yakobo sɔɔ ejeɔ ehe ponɔɔ tšoɔ bɔfuɔ me tšoɔ. Nyagbe kplaɔ ejeɔ ehe ponɔɔ imi hu lɔ. Imi ne inge ka nɔ kɔɔ ne akpato

reference: Imi ji bɔfo ɔmɛ tsuo a kpɛti nɔ nɛ sɛ́ pe kulaa; i sɛ́ kaa a tsɛɛ mi bɔfo po, ejakaa i wa Mawu we asafo ɔ yi mi.
hypothesis: Mi mi bo fo me to akpeti no ne se pe cla. I se ka aci mi bo fo po. E ja ka e wa manwe asafu o yi.

reference: Se Mawu dloomi lɛ pee mi nɔ́ nɛ i ji mwɔnɛ nɛ ɔ, nɛ dloomi nɛ e dloo mi ɔ pee we yaka. Ee, i tsu ní wawɛɛ pe bɔfo kpa amɛ tsuo kulaa, se pi imi; Mawu dloomi ɔ mohu lɛ tsu ní ɔ.
hypothesis: Se ma dromi le pe mino ne iji monenno. Ne dromi ne e dromio pe woyaka. E ichuni wa we pe bofokpa amee tsuokla se pe imi. Ma dromio mo le chuni.

reference: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ, imi jio, mɛ jio, e hia we kulaa; nɔ́ nɛ he hia kɛkɛ ji kaa wɔ tsuo wa fiɛ Mawu sɛ gbi ɔ ngɔ ha nyɛ, nɛ nyɛ he ye.
hypothesis: Nɔhiɔ imi jio, mejio. Ehyia wɛɛ kla. Nɛɛ nɛ ehyia kɛkeɛ ji kan. Wɔ tu wɔ fiamɔ se gbe nɛ wɔ ha nye. Nɛ nye heie

reference: Jehanɛ ɔ, akɛnɛ wa sɛ gbi ɔ ji kaa Mawu tle Kristo si kɛ je gbeje ɔ, mɛni he je nyɛ ti ni komɛ deɔ ke a be ni gbogboehi si tlee kɛ ba wami mi ɔ?
hypothesis: Ya ne. A kane wa segbe nio ji ka ma onye Kristo si ke je gbe je o. Menyini he je nyɛ ti ni ko me dio ke, abɛ ni gbogbo insi tɛ kɛ ba wa minio.

reference: Ke a be ni gbogboehi si tlee kɛ ba wami mi ekohu ɔ, lɛɛ a tle we Kristo hu si mɔ.
hypothesis: Ke abɛ ni gogboɛ ni te kɛba wa mimiɛ kɛku hu o. Lɛ atɛo wɛɛ kɛisto hu nɛɛ si hu.

reference: Ke a tle we Kristo si kɛ bɛ wami mi ekohu ɔ, lɛɛ wa fiɛmi ɔ pee yaka; nɛ nyɛ hemi kɛ yemi ɔ hu pee yaka.
hypothesis: Kɛɛ atɛɔ Kristo sikɛ bɛ wa mimɛɛ ko hu o, lɛɛ wa siɛmimi o pɛɛ aka. Ni nyɛ he mi kɛɛ imi hu pɛɛ aka.

reference: Pi enɛ ɔ kɛkɛ! E tsɔɔ kaa wa ye Mawu he lakpa, ejakaa wa de ke e tle Kristo si kɛ je gbeje. Se ke e ngɛ mi kaa a tle we ni gbogboehi si kɛ bɛ wami mi ekohu ɔ, lɛɛ Mawu tsa tle we Kristo si mɔ.
hypothesis: Pɩ e nɛɔ kɛɛ, e cɔɔ kan waa ye maa hu nɛɛ lapa. E ja kan waa deke e tre Kristo si kɛɛ je gbeje. Se ke e ngɛɛ mi kan a tre we ni gbugbo nɛɛ nɛɛ, ke e ba wa mi mi e ko hu oo. Le maa hu kɛ a tre we Kristo si.

reference: Ejakaa ke a tle we ni gbogboehi si ɔ, lɛɛ Kristo hu a tle we lɛ si.
hypothesis: E ya ka ke a tewɛ nɛ gbe gbɛ nɛnɛ si o. Nɛ Kristo hu a tewɛ lɛ.

reference: Ke Mawu tle we Kristo si ɔ, lɛɛ nyɛ hemi kɛ yemi ɔ pee yaka, nɛ nyɛ ngɛ yayami he wami ɔ sisi kɛ mwɔɔ.
hypothesis: ke maun tsoɛ klɔsɔɔ ni lɛ nyɛhe mi kɛɛ miɔ pɛɛkaa nɛɛ nyɛ ngɛɛ ya mi he wa miɔ sisi kɛɛ moni.

reference: Kɛkɛ ɔ, nihi nɛ he Kristo ye nɛ a gbo ɔ, mɛ hu a hɛ mi kpata.
hypothesis: Kɛkɛɔ, ni ni Kristo ye ne agboɔ. Mɛ hu ahɛmɛkpa

reference: Ke wami nɛ ɔ mi kɛkɛ he nɛ wa ngɔ wa hɛ ngɔ fɔ Kristo nɔ ngɛ ɔ, lɛɛ wa ní ngɛ mɔbɔ pe nihi tsuo.
hypothesis: kɛɛ wami nɛ womi kɛkɛɛ. Niwango wahi ngɛ Kristo nɛ ngɛɛ o. Le wani ngɛ mobo pɛ ni chuu.

reference: Se anɔkuale ɔ ji kaa Mawu tle Kristo si kɛ je gbeje nɛ e kɛ ye odase kaa e ma tle ni nɛmɛ nɛ gbo ɔ tsuo si.
hypothesis: Se anɔkwale odi kan, ma wo Kristo sika dɛ gbeje, nɛ eke ya odase kan, ema te nyɛ nɛ mi gbe o tso si.

reference: Ejakaa kaa bɔ nɛ gbenɔ gu adesa nɔ kɛ ba a, jã nɔuu kɛ̃ adesa nɔ gbogboehi a si temi ɔ gu kɛ ba.
hypothesis: Mɛɛ kɛɛ kɛɛ bɔ ni ngmɛɛnɛ gbi nɛ ɔ ngɛ adesɛɛ nɔ kɛ ba. Ja nɛ ɔ kɛ adesɛɛ nɛ gbo gbi nɛ ɔ a tsɛ ke mi ngmɛɛnɛ kɛ ba.

reference: Kaa bɔ nɛ nihi tsuo ngɛ Adam mi gboɔ ɔ, jã nɔuu kɛ̃ a ma tle nihi tsuo si ngɛ Kristo mi.
hypothesis: Kaa baa ne niijo ngë Adam mi bo. Jaano ke amatre niijo singa Kristo.

reference: Se Mawu ma tle nɔ tsuaa nɔ si ngɛ be nɛ sa mi. Kekleekle nɔ ji Kristo, nɛ lɔ ɔ se ke Kristo ma a, a ma tle e we bi ɔmɛ hu si.
hypothesis: Séé moma tsoeno tsoeno si nge be nɛ samii. Kɛɛ kɛɛ no ji Kristo, nɛɛ lo se kɛɛ Kristo maa amaa tre eewie bɛɔ mɛ hu sa.

reference: Lɔ ɔ se ɔ, je mi nyagbe maa ba. Kristo maa ye mumi mi nɔ yeli, kɛ blɔ nyahi, kɛ he wami tsuo a nɔ, nɛ e maa ngɔ matsɛ yemi ɔ ngɔ ha Mawu nɛ ji Tsɛ ɔ.
hypothesis: la seo jemina gbe maba Kristo maye mumumi no yeli ke blo nya he ke he wa mi tso ano ne emagbo macha ye mi ngogbo ma wo ne ji cheo

reference: Ejakaa ja Kristo ye matsɛ kɛ maa su be nɛ Mawu maa ngɔ e he nyɛli tsuo ngɔ wo e nane si.
hypothesis: E jake jake Kristo emaje, kɛ ma su bene mɔ mangɔ ehe nyɛli tuɔngɔ we nɛ ni

reference: Nyagbe he nyɛlɔ nɛ a ma kpata e hɛ mi ji gbenɔ.
hypothesis: Nya gbe he nyelo ne ama kwata he mi ji gbe.

reference: Ngmami ɔ ke, “Mawu ngɔ níhi tsuo ngɔ wo e nane si.” Se e fɔɔ si paa kaa munyu “níhi tsuo” ɔ tsɔɔ we kaa lɛ Mawu ɔ nitsɛ nɛ e ngɔ níhi tsuo ngɔ wo Kristo nane si ɔ hu piɛ he.
hypothesis: Mami okε, mɔngɔnihi tsuo ngɔɔ wa e nɛ nɛsi. Se e fɔɔ si pa, kɛ munyu nihi tsuo, jɔɔ e kɛ lɛ mɔngɔɔni cɛ. Ni e ngɔnihi tsuo ngɔɔ Kristo nɛ nɛsiɔ, hu piɛɛhe.

reference: Se ke a ngɔ níhi tsuo ngɔ wo Kristo nɔ yemi sisi ɔ, lɛɛ Bi ɔ nitsɛ hu maa ngɔ e he ngɔ ha Mawu, nɔ nɛ ngɔ níhi tsuo ngɔ wo e nɔ yemi sisi ɔ. Nɛ Mawu maa ye ní ɔmɛ tsuo a nɔ.
hypothesis: Se ke a ngo ní e chuoweo Kristo no ye misision, le bio ni e chuoweo mango e no ha mam, no ne ngo ni e chuoweo eno ye misision, ne mango ma yie nio me chuoweo ano.

reference: Jehanɛ ɔ, nihi nɛ a sɔlee mɛ ngɛ ni nɛmɛ nɛ gbo a nane mi ɔ, nyɛ ha wa susu a he kuku. Ke e ngɛ mi niinɛ kaa bɔ nɛ ni komɛ tsɔɔ ɔ, kaa a be ni gbogboehi si tlee kɛ ba wami mi ekohu ɔ, mɛni he je mɔ nɛ ni nɛ ɔmɛ ha nɛ a ngɛ mɛ sɔlee ngɛ ni nɛmɛ nɛ gbo ɔ a nane mi?
hypothesis: Ya no. Ní nɛ aso lɛ, ngɛ nī nɛ mī gbo a nade mi ɔ, nī ha wa susu aye kuku ke ngɛ mī nī nɛ kɛ mɔ ne kɔ mɛ cɔɔ. Kɛ abɛ nī gbo gbe ɛɛ nsi ntre kɛ bɛ wa mī mī kuku o. Mī ni he je mɔ nɛ nī nɛ ɔ mɛ ha nɛ angɛ mɛ sɔlɛ ngɛ nī nɛ mī gbo a nade mi.

reference: Ke a be ni gbogboehi si tlee kɛ ba wami mi ekohu ɔ, mɛni he je mɔ lɛ wɔ hu wa ngɛ gbenɔ nya mi ngmlɛfia tsuaa ngmlɛfia a?
hypothesis: ke, abɛɛ nɛɛ gbe gbe nɛɛ, nyɛɛ baa mi, yɛɛ kɛɛ nyɛɛ ko hu o. Mi nɛɛ, ye jɛɛ mo lɛɛ wa hun wa ngɛ gbe no, nyami ngɛɛ, fiɛɛ choo, amɛɛ fiɛɛ.

reference: Ye nyɛmimɛ, daa ligbi ɔ, i ngɛ gbenɔ nya mi! Fiami nɛ i fĩaa ngɔ fɔɔ nyɛ nɔ ji kaa wa le Nyɔmtsɛ Yesu Kristo.
hypothesis: Ye nyɛmi mɛ, daa ligbi ɔ, yi nga gbe no nyami. Fiami nɛ yi fia ngɔ fo nyɛ no ji kã, wa le nyɔm tɛɔ Yesu Kristo.

reference: Ke je nɛ ɔ mi níhi a he lɛ i kɛ lohwe dikali ɔmɛ hwu ta ngɛ ngɛ Efeso ɔ, lɛɛ mɛni se i na mɔ? (Efeso bi a ngɛ dee ɔ nɛ). Se ke a be ni gbogboehi si tlee kɛ ba wami mi ekohu ɔ, lɛɛ kaa bɔ nɛ a pɔɔ demi ɔ, “Nyɛ ha waa ye ní nɛ wa nu ní, ejakaa hwɔɔ pɛ wa gbo.”
hypothesis: Ke jɛ nɛ o mii na he lɛ, i kɛɛ lɔɔ ke o ke ha me hu tãa ngɛ efisɛo. Lɛɛ minɛ se inamo, efisɛo bi amɛ dɛ ɔ nɛ. Sɛɛ ke abɛ ni gbɔgboɔ si tɛɛ ke ba wa mɛi kɛ hũu ɔ. Lɛɛ kamboni a tɔɔ dɛ mi o. Nye ha wa ye nii, no wa nu nii ejaaka hũu pɛ wa gbo.

reference: Nyɛ ko ha nɛ a sisi nyɛ. “Huɛ yaya bɔmi puɛɔ je mi bami kpakpa.”
hypothesis: Nyɛ kɔhã ne atsɛ si nyɛ. Ngɔ yayɛ bɔ mi pɛɔ jee mi bami pampa.
